name: Team Joe
subject: re: tonight's press conference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Donald Trump is failing all of us. |
---
Peter,

In a moment when our country is yearning for real leadership, Donald Trump is failing all of us.

**Our country passed 4 million COVID-19 cases, but at tonight 's White House coronavirus press briefing, without Dr. Fauci in the room, Trump said, "The country is in very good shape other than if you look south and west."**

It's unacceptable. Donald Trump continues to carry out a reckless approach to guiding our country through this pandemic, costing over a hundred thousand lives and even more livelihoods.

Americans need a president who will follow the medical experts' guidance and keep as many of us as safe and healthy as possible.**We need Joe Biden.**

[**Peter, can you do your part to fund the work necessary over the next few months to cement a path to 270 electoral votes and defeat Donald Trump? There is too much at stake for any of us to sit on the sidelines right now »**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B3_rapidresponse_X__F2_S2_C2__ac_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B3_rapidresponse_X__F2_S2_C2__ac_T2") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8ea/1cd0ac28/173b9880e/357dc657/1959503768/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8ea/1cd0ac28/173b9880e/357dc65d/1959503768/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). | | | Friends,

We are just finishing up a great day out in KS-01! Thank you to folks in Marysville, Washington, Belleville, Junction City, and Clay Center for allowing us to drop in and meet with meet you.

| **Join us tomorrow! **

We are continuing our campaign with visits across the Big First tomorrow, **July 24** :

**11:00 - 12:00 PM:** Meet and Greet in Council Grove, 112 W Main Street
**1:15 - 2:00 PM:** Meet and Greet in Hillsboro, 116 N Main Street
**3:30 - 4:45 PM:** Meet and Greet with Reno County Farm Bureau, 6009 W Red Rock Road, Hutchinson

Keep up-to-date with our campaign by following us on [Facebook](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=bee7772c99&e=a9d1410029), [Twitter](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=e8a4dd2c23&e=a9d1410029), or by visiting our [website](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=ddf56f8059&e=a9d1410029).

Tracey

I'm looking forward to going to battle for the people alongside a warrior like Kamala Harris in the Senate.

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Kamala Harris
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** Wednesday, July 22
**Subject:** This November

Friend,

Our nation is in crisis.

As I'm writing to you, amidst a public health emergency, President Trump is deploying unidentified federal troops to patrol our cities and snatch American citizens into unmarked vans on our streets.

We *must* win the White House and secure a majority in the U.S. Senate.

**That's why today I'm urging you to join me in supporting my friend Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate in Georgia.**

Jon is an investigative journalist and media executive whose company has exposed bribery, human traffickers, war crimes, and corporate abuses.

I've gotten to know Jon over the last few years, and his passion for exposing corruption and the abuse of power is EXACTLY what's called for in the Senate today.

I want Jon Ossoff to fight alongside me in the U.S. Senate. So I'm asking you to help:
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212f/5b2c1286/3dc02e57/25f16b95/375908717/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_23_end_khk?refcode=em_2020_07_23_end_khk&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")
_Since winning the Democratic nomination in a landslide, Jon has earned the endorsement of organizations like NARAL Pro-Choice America, Planned Parenthood, and the Human Rights Campaign._

**Friend, they all know what I know: Jon Ossoff is a champion of the people who will stand up to corruption and the abuse of power.**

Trump and Mitch McConnell know Jon is a threat. Republican super PACs have already committed more than $21 million to try to stop him. We need to show our grassroots power and equip Jon to hit back twice as hard.

**[Can you chip in $5 to elect Jon Ossoff and flip Georgia blue?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212f/5b2c1286/3dc02e57/25f16b95/375908717/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_23_end_khk?refcode=em_2020_07_23_end_khk&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [Express Donate: $5](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212f/5b2c1286/3dc02e57/25f16b94/375908717/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_23_end_khk?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_2020_07_23_end_khk_ex_5")

---
**Friend, it's long past time to end Mitch McConnell's reign in the Senate.**

If Democrats win the Senate majority, we won't have to worry about another two years of extreme right-wing judges and disgraceful attempts to rip health care away from millions of Americans.

Instead, we will be able to make real progress on the issues that are important to us: making prescription drugs affordable, taking meaningful steps to combat the climate crisis, addressing police brutality, keeping our children safe from gun violence, and securing equal justice for all.

**Georgia is a key battleground state and Jon is running to win one of the most flippable seats in the Senate. For Democrats to win a Senate majority, we have to win this seat.**

**_And Jon has what it takes to win._**

**_But only with your help, friend._**

**[If you want to flip the Senate and end Mitch McConnell's majority, will you chip in $5 right now to elect Jon Ossoff in Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212f/5b2c1286/3dc02e57/25f16b95/375908717/VEsHAQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_23_end_khk?refcode=em_2020_07_23_end_khk&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")**

| [Express Donate: $5](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212f/5b2c1286/3dc02e57/25f16b94/375908717/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_23_end_khk?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_2020_07_23_end_khk_ex_5")

Thank you for stepping up,

name: Steve Chabot Press
subject: Congressman Chabot Endorsed by Voices for Small Business, Law Enforcement, Physicians
body:
Chabot Receives Backing of NFIB, OSMA and Cincinnati Fraternal Order of Police
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkddutkt-kujkulhluu-u/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkddutkt-kujkulhluu-r/) **CONGRESSMAN CHABOT ENDORSED BY VOICES FOR SMALL BUSINESS, LAW ENFORCEMENT, PHYSICIANS** _Chabot Receives Backing of NFIB, OSMA and Cincinnati Fraternal Order of Police_ **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** July 23, 2020Cincinnati, OH -- Congressman Steve Chabot's (R-OH-01) campaign for reelection has received endorsements from a growing number of organizations representing key voices for Ohio, including small business, law enforcement and the medical community. This month, Chabot earned the support of the National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB), the Ohio State Medical Association PAC and the Cincinnati Fraternal Order of Police Queen City Lodge No. 69. "I am honored to have the support of Ohio law enforcement, physicians and small businesses and will continue fighting every day to deliver results for these pillars of our Ohio communities," said Congressman Chabot. "I am tremendously proud of my record of standing with law enforcement to keep Ohio families safe, supporting our doctors and medical community to keep Ohioans healthy and securing support and relief for Ohio small businesses and their workers through these challenging times."About the Ohio State Medical Association"The Ohio State Medical Association (OSMA) is the first and largest physician-led organization in Ohio. We proactively and persistently advocate for effective healthcare policy outcomes, provide professional development opportunities for physicians, and promote useful resources that advance patient care and the medical profession. Established in 1846, the OSMA is the leading voice of physicians, residents and medical students in Ohio." ([Ohio State Medical Association](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkddutkt-kujkulhluu-y/), Accessed 7/23/20)About the National Federation of Independent Business"NFIB is the voice of small business, advocating on behalf of America's small and independent business owners, both in Washington, D.C., and in all 50 state capitals. NFIB is nonprofit, nonpartisan, and member-driven. Since our founding in 1943, NFIB has been exclusively dedicated to small and independent businesses, and remains so today." ([National Federation of Independent Business](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkddutkt-kujkulhluu-j/), Accessed 7/23/20)About the Cincinnati Fraternal Order of Police Queen City Lodge No. 69."The Fraternal Order of Police is the world's largest organization of sworn law enforcement officers ... the voice of those who dedicate their lives to protecting and serving our communities." The Queen City Lodge No. 69 represents police officers in the City of Cincinnati. ([Fraternal Order of Police](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkddutkt-kujkulhluu-t/), Accessed 7/23/20; [Fraternal Order of Police Local 69](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkddutkt-kujkulhluu-i/), Accessed 7/23/20) ### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkddutkt-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkddutkt-kujkulhluu-h/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkddutkt-kujkulhluu-k/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
That’s what we called our new ad, because it’s what we sorely need right now. Watch it here.
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkddutut-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend, Last night, I watched Bill Hagerty’s latest attack ad on me. I’ll be honest: I had conflicting emotions as I watched it. I was disappointed because of just how dishonest the attack was. **But I was also hopeful -_because Bill Hagerty wouldn’t be attacking us like this if we weren’t winning._** So how do we respond to an ad that’s full of falsehoods? With our own, called “The Truth.” [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkddutut-olhhkyhhid-j/) [WATCH OUR NEW AD NOW - "THE TRUTH"](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkddutut-olhhkyhhid-t/) If Bill Hagerty’s plan to get to the Senate is to try and deceive Tennessee voters, I guess he’s welcome to do that. All we can do is tell the truth, and rely on the honesty and intelligence of the people of Tennessee. I’m counting on that. Here’s the Truth: I’ve always opposed Obamacare - I even testified before the U.S. Senate against it. I think what stings the most is hearing Bill Hagerty say I’m not pro-life. As a Christian, I believe we're called to protect the unborn, and as a doctor, I’ve taken an oath and dedicated my life to protecting all human life. That's why I'm pro-life. I want you to know how much Maya and I appreciate your support. I’ve been thinking a lot about the verse from Galatians lately, “Let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up.” We’re doing a good thing here in this campaign. Let’s just keep working, and keep telling the truth. Thanks for standing with us. Thank you for your support,
Dr. Manny Sethi
Conservative Republican for U.S. Senate Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

Dear Friend, _"Government is not the solution to our problem, government is the problem."_ \- Ronald Reagan, January 20, 1981 _"Deconstruction of the administrative state"_ \- Goal pronounced by Steve Bannon, February 20, 2017 In the 36 years and one month between when Reagan uttered the first quote and Bannon the second, we've seen relentless defunding of government, politicization of independent agencies, and disparagement of public employees at all levels. Nobody wants a bloated, intrusive federal government. But it turns out that when disaster strikes at the lives and livelihoods of every American, we do want an effective one. I'll remind you that Pete Sessions was in Congress for 22 of those 36 years. And leave you with one final quote - "A government ill executed, whatever it may be in theory, must be, in practice, a bad government." \- Alexander Hamilton, Federalist 70, March 18, 1788 _**[Demand Better. Pitch in now and help me beat Pete.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18382760/226768272/-1907457920?refcode=07202420_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjYzNjhhZC1hZWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y_TRlx69txiYeUnZGP1HHatCEvEskNJMyKuORQ82dtw=)**_ _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | ONE TIME CONTRIBUTIONS | MONTHLY CONTRIBUTIONS

name: Madison Hinz
subject: URGENT: Jessi Melton Calling & Canvassing
body:
Hi everyone!

Absentee ballots have been out for TWO WEEKS, and our constituents are sending them back!

Now is the time to make sure the people of district 22 are voting for Jessi!!

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Term Limits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
I've never backed down from a challenge. Not when I was tasked with leading the world's only women-owned manufacturing company of its kind. Not whe Our Founding Fathers intended for public service to be done by a civilian legislature. This is why I unequivocally support a constitutional amendment to put term limits on the United States House and Senate. Every day the American people need citizen legislators that go to Washington to work directly for them, not to make a lifelong career for themselves.
I have committed to serving no more than four terms in the House of Representatives in order to do my part in fixing establishment corruption and to help the president drain the swamp in Washington D.C. Career politicians have failed to uphold the values our country was originally founded on. Long careers in Congress do not result in better policies and smaller government, in fact they do the opposite. Career politicians have resulted in bigger government, expansive regulations, and higher debt for citizens of our country. I believe as elected officials, it is our duty to represent our congressional district’s constituents, not uphold the status quo and Washington point of view.
I want to go to Washington to fight back against the corruption and stop politicians from padding their salaries with taxpayer dollars. [**JOIN LISA: CHIP IN $25**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=49dc39b3867f4a8586565a11f78f82a2&_e=4hcnnazV7LnFBtgXwhx9c1O3gqC6DsCVfm8hwU2rAAvz5g2TSwSorqLwCA4Olx8MFb6vaRjv6feLPeZcdUZFcUx_7JnAF3nvrGS9Mni6nA-tCGHZ931dZ4x-Q7wupSqJqAjYnAorLRlltmhHXokc7IRYvG6KIyeoWCmruhhHZEhpep1T8NLO57KDSw3qF-p3m2gGmXZhtsKGVXGWF_qxsN85MgGfmJQuwWkKopCzofMMJLHSBLm7egy4KJFr_8Wl40VVkKIkc46-Fjl7WRJmQp3zeVz5XePSQx4Q69HuXY06cFh4PvXwjMuHgomx_qAdR4m5J1ZnzpgpUu702douCp8tvfqvkSpngeC9l1RpBQCQyNX7rBNO-7MRfr-Um0b-AEr8grkzuGowdOoQ2jB3dxDDzudlr4k1txSSw-tJYhNte2Ak6W7B1YHJD9CLW-Rj) Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18387995/226852350/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2JkODVmZC1jOWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdXwQTA2roQhBKHKwiABH7KgRBN1XqunFV7CP4SU7Ik=&emci=d8bd85fd-c9cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=dcbd85fd-c9cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Hi folks, it's Mike again. One week from today, **the pandemic unemployment benefits provided to workers through the CARES Act are set to expire. ** That means unemployed Americans will no longer receive the additional $600 per week payments they’ve been relying on to make ends meet during this pandemic. In Mississippi, the situation has never been more urgent. **Mississippians have the lowest unemployment payments in the country.** And those in our state have been dealing with an antiquated system — meaning thousands of workers in Mississippi have never been able to receive benefits despite being out of work for months. Our leaders in Washington D.C. have had plenty of time to prevent this, all summer in fact. But when a reporter asked him if the Senate would pass a new relief bill before these unemployment benefits expire, _Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell simply laughed_. And Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith said she would “put the breaks on” further relief while hundreds of thousands of Mississippians were out of work. **Well, I sure hope Mitch McConnell and Cindy Hyde-Smith enjoyed their summer vacations while hard-working Americans have been getting sick, going hungry, losing their jobs, and going broke.** They are turning their backs on Mississippians everywhere by refusing to pass more financial relief for those hit hardest by this historic financial crisis. That’s why it’s on us to put pressure on them to act before it’s too late. **[Sign my petition demanding the Senate extend supplemental unemployment assistance to the millions of Americans forced out of work due to the COVID-19 pandemic.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18387996/226852351/613113352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2JkODVmZC1jOWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdXwQTA2roQhBKHKwiABH7KgRBN1XqunFV7CP4SU7Ik=&emci=d8bd85fd-c9cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=dcbd85fd-c9cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18387997/226852352/613113352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2JkODVmZC1jOWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdXwQTA2roQhBKHKwiABH7KgRBN1XqunFV7CP4SU7Ik=&emci=d8bd85fd-c9cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=dcbd85fd-c9cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
---
Together, let’s demand more from those in power during this unprecedented crisis. Millions of workers and their families are counting on it.
– Mike Espy

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Will you stand with me, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
We can’t risk putting our students in harm’s way by reopening our schools without a plan backed by medical experts.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18388009/226852825/462758527?refcode=em_pet_2020.07.24_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=464d7005-cacd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjRkNzAwNS1jYWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L7dpLJMAdQABr05YaOPA75vJXuoGKBwIRGA2qjRszto=) Team,

There is no doubt that we are in the midst of a very challenging time for families across the country. And as the father of a 17 year old, there is nothing I want more than for her to be able to return to school with her friends and enjoy her senior year.

But how and when schools reopen should be determined by science, not politics. So when I saw my opponent, Scott Perry, spreading misinformation in order to pressure schools to open early for his own political benefit, it was clear that our representative does not have a handle on the facts of this crisis.

**The truth is, we’re seeing an uptick in COVID-19 cases here in Pennsylvania, and cases are becoming more and more prevalent in our young people.** We can’t risk putting our students in harm’s way by reopening our schools without a plan backed by medical experts.

[**Will you stand with me in telling Scott Perry to listen to public health officials and put the safety of our students, not politics, first?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18388010/226852826/-169560829?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjRkNzAwNS1jYWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L7dpLJMAdQABr05YaOPA75vJXuoGKBwIRGA2qjRszto=&emci=d6eddf35-bccd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=464d7005-cacd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249) | [Protect our students »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18388011/226852827/-169560829?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjRkNzAwNS1jYWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L7dpLJMAdQABr05YaOPA75vJXuoGKBwIRGA2qjRszto=&emci=d6eddf35-bccd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=464d7005-cacd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249)
---

**Friend -- this isn’t about politics.** Partisan agendas have no place in a discussion about the health and safety of our children. Our communities deserve leaders who will put aside their own ideology and listen to parents, educators, and public health experts. _Especially in the middle of a global pandemic._

**[Sign my petition to call on Scott Perry and our elected officials to let medical experts lead the way on this issue and prioritize the safety and well-being of our students.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18388012/226852828/-169560829?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjRkNzAwNS1jYWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L7dpLJMAdQABr05YaOPA75vJXuoGKBwIRGA2qjRszto=&emci=d6eddf35-bccd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=464d7005-cacd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10203249)**

clean_body: We can’t risk putting our students in harm’s way by reopening our schools without a plan backed by medical experts. = Team, There is no doubt that we are in the midst of a very challenging time for families across the country. And as the father of a 17 year old, there is nothing I want more than for her to be able to return to school with her friends and enjoy her senior year. But how and when schools reopen should be determined by science, not politics. So when I saw my opponent, Scott Perry, spreading misinformation in order to pressure schools to open early for his own political benefit, it was clear that our representative does not have a handle on the facts of this crisis. The truth is, we’re seeing an uptick in COVID-19 cases here in Pennsylvania, and cases are becoming more and more prevalent in our young people. We can’t risk putting our students in harm’s way by reopening our schools without a plan backed by medical experts. | Friend -- this isn’t about politics. Partisan agendas have no place in a discussion about the health and safety of our children. Our communities deserve leaders who will put aside their own ideology and listen to parents, educators, and public health experts. Especially in the middle of a global pandemic. Thank you for standing with me, friend. There is nothing more important than protecting our children, and I am grateful to have you in this fight with me. \--Eugene Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. name: Mike T.
subject: our pasta dinner is going virtual!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [Click here to unsubscribe from Mike's email list
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

I’m excited to announce that we are hosting a Napa virtual pasta dinner! I hope you can join us on Zoom for a virtual pasta dinner together on Sunday, August 9th from 5 to 6 PM with special guests, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Representative Gabby Giffords, Representative Lauren Underwood, and other surprise guests!

Our dinner will support Tre Posti and Southside Century, two local businesses in our community, and remaining proceeds will be donated to the Community Action of Napa Valley. Place your order by Thursday, August 5th to have your vegetarian pasta dinner ready for pickup between 2-4 pm on Sunday, August 9th.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18388413/226861329/-1336141132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWI0YjY3Yi1jY2NkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRge8ntRahVhK0vWBoMYgjNc6vWvMoqAqTMyRqdKek4=&emci=9cb4b67b-cccd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=9eb4b67b-cccd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)
Your contribution will pay for your Baked Ziti with Tomato Ragu with Garlic and Thyme, a Lemon Caper Caesar Salad with Parmesan Croutons, and Focaccia Bread with Rosemary and Sea Salt. Just prior to the event, all participants will receive the Zoom login.

If you’re unable to attend but want to make a donation to the Community Action of Napa Valley, please click here:
[**_https://www.mikethompsonforcongress.com/event/napa-valley-virtual-pasta-dinner_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18388414/226861358/-1336141132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWI0YjY3Yi1jY2NkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRge8ntRahVhK0vWBoMYgjNc6vWvMoqAqTMyRqdKek4=&emci=9cb4b67b-cccd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=9eb4b67b-cccd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=2678920)

I hope you can join us and enjoy a great pasta dinner while supporting two cherished local businesses.

We can’t wait to see you there!

Mike T.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Here's Why We Need to Recall Walz
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter -- Governor Walz issued a statewide mask mandate on Wednesday. Where a Governor gets the power to force citizens to wear a piece of cloth is a mystery to anyone with a basic understanding of constitutional law. **Walz is showing his true disdain for democratic principles by unilaterally issuing the illegal order. Democrats who purport to believe in democracy, are displaying their true love for authoritarian 'benevolent' dictatorship.** Walz waited until the Minnesota legislature adjourned to issue his illegal order, thus leaving citizens without any legal recourse outside of the court system, which already has its own mask mandate. Violators of the order can be fined and employers who violate the law could face up to 90 days of jail time. Which means the responsibility of enforcement falls on local police departments who are already stressed from the tensions created by the BLM movement. Now they'll have to decide if they are going to enforce an illegal order. Is the science of preventing the spread of COVID by using masks settled? Minnesota's foremost expert Dr Mike Osterholm has made numerous statements on how non-N95 masks are not very effective in stopping the spread. **But let's assume he's wrong and Walz' "science" is better. Why did Walz wait until Saturday for the mandate to go into effect? If this is about saving lives, how many people have died in the past three days as Walz still allowed freedom?** It's clear that this isn't about science, it's all about controlling people. Instead of a system of government where elected officials work for us and we tell them what to do, Walz is switching the paradigm around. Walz' One Minnesota vision is finally becoming clear to us. It's an anti-democratic, unconstitutional vision of compliance with his dictatorial orders. "Do as I say, or else!" Mask wearing and social distancing are his orders and violators will be prosecuted. It's time patriotic Minnesotans stand up to Governor Walz and hold him accountable for his abuse of power. This week the formal legal effort to recall Walz resumed as a second proposed petition was submitted to the Secretary of State. Walz must pay the price. Will you do me a favor? If you have not signed the petition to Recall Walz yet, please [click on the link](http://www.action4liberty.com/recall_walz?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_retarget&n=2). If you already have signed it, will you send this email to friends and family who also want to see Walz recalled? **It's up to patriotic Minnesotans to stand against this authoritarian, tyrant-in-making Walz. Today, the order is mandating cloth coverings. Tomorrow, it's forcing coronavirus vaccinations. This is the WRONG direction for a free country.**
# [SIGN RECALL WALZ PETITION](http://www.action4liberty.com/recall_walz?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_retarget&n=3)
**In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_retarget&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_retarget&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_retarget&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Biden for President
subject: Peter, please take our new survey for Democrats tuning into the Convention >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We're less than a month away from the start of the Democratic National Convention. |
---
Peter, we're less than a month away from the start of the Democratic National Convention, where Joe will become our OFFICIAL Democratic nominee for President!

We know how excited everyone is to see Democrats across the country join forces to beat Donald Trump!

Convention Week is going to be an amazing time to see all of our hard work come together -- and we hope you'll join us virtually for some of the action!

**And since this is a great time to check-in and make sure we have an updated supporter record for you, we have a brand new, short questionnaire about Democratic issues and priorities for you to take.**

[**Will you take a few seconds to take our new survey today so we have some updated information about your issue priorities before the Convention starts?**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc696/3708220891/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1_nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1_nonopeners_RS") | **Convention Attendee Issue Survey**

**Name:** Peter Willis
**Date:** 7/24/2020
---
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc696/3708220891/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1_nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1_nonopeners_RS")
| [BEGIN SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc695/3708220891/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1_nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1_nonopeners_RS")
---
Over the Convention's four days, we'll hear from Democrats across the country, nominate Joe Biden and his running mate as our official ticket for President and Vice President of the United States, and show the world our strong, unified party.

But after the Convention, Peter, the real work begins. We'll be jumping headfirst into the most crucial months of this race, so we need to make sure we include feedback from folks across the country about what issues are on the ballot this November.

That's why we're asking you to take our brand-new survey. We know we ask for your feedback a lot, but it's all to make sure our campaign continues to reflect the people it belongs to (that's you, Peter!).

**So, if you could take a couple of minutes today to make sure your record is up to date by answering a few short questions on our Convention Attendee Issue Survey, we 'd be so grateful for your response! Click below to begin the survey:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Convention-Attendee-Issue-Survey**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc696/3708220891/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1_nonopeners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.07.21_B1_convention-issues_X__F1_S2_C1_nonopeners_RS")

Thanks for everything you do,

Biden for President
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc694/3708220891/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc693/3708220891/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc692/3708220891/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc691/3708220891/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc690/3708220891/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc68f/3708220891/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc68e/3708220891/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc68d/3708220891/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc68c/3708220891/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc68b/3708220891/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc68e/3708220891/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc68a/3708220891/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc68d/3708220891/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d2/1cd0ac28/173dbeb6d/357dc689/3708220891/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

subject: BREAKING: 3,500 scientists just penned a national letter of support for Dr. Fauci

body:
This is a stunning and unprecedented show of support for America's Doctor -- Join them and let's protect Dr. Fauci! 314 Action Fund

You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest or taken part in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7a10/4bd7760e/50181b5f/77a90be8/1476542495/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/less-email/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&source=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&refcode=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter") for only the most important emails.

To unsubscribe instantly you can click [here.](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7a10/4bd7760e/50181b5f/77a90bf7/1476542495/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1MDE4MWI1ZiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI3YTEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://act.314actionfund.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/50181b5f/29bb7a10?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&source=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&refcode=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter")
| [](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7a10/4bd7760e/50181b5f/77a90bf6/1476542495/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci-2/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&source=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&refcode=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter")

[Public health experts and scientists from coast to coast are rising up in support of Dr. Fauci: Add your name to sign-on to their letter of support!](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7a10/4bd7760e/50181b5f/77a90bf5/1476542495/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci-2/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Public+health+experts+and+scientists+fro&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&source=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&refcode=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter")
**[SIGN THE LETTER](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7a10/4bd7760e/50181b5f/77a90bf4/1476542495/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci-2/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+SIGN+THE+LETTER&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&source=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&refcode=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter")** At a time when Donald Trump and Republicans are INTENSIFYING their attacks on America's Doctor, scientists all across the nation are fighting back!

**In the past weeks, the GOP has made Dr. Fauci a TOP TARGET of their attacks:**
* The White House canceled ALL of Dr. Fauci's TV appearances because Donald Trump was "ANNOYED" that he was getting too much attention.

* One of Trump's top advisers published a nationwide op-ed SLAMMING Dr. Fauci as "WRONG ABOUT EVERYTHING!"

* Texas Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick told Texans Dr. Fauci "doesn't know what he's talking about!" and that they shouldn't listen to his advice.

Republicans called COVID-19 a hoax and Dr. Fauci as well as scientists all across the country have corrected their misinformation and worked on the frontlines during this crisis.

**Now, scientists who rarely comment on politics are speaking out in a STUNNING defense of Dr. Fauci as Trump and Republicans SLANDER him daily.**

[Sign On: Join nearly 3,500 respected public health officials from every state in supporting Dr. Fauci by adding your signature to their letter.](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7a10/4bd7760e/50181b5f/77a90bf3/1476542495/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci-2/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Sign+On+Join+nearly+3500+respected+publi&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&source=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&refcode=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter")

[](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7a10/4bd7760e/50181b5f/77a90bf2/1476542495/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci-2/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&source=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&refcode=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter")
**[SIGN THE LETTER](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7a10/4bd7760e/50181b5f/77a90bf1/1476542495/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci-2/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+SIGN+THE+LETTER&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&source=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&refcode=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter")** Thank you -- we cannot afford for Dr. Fauci and science to be sidelined by an increasingly insecure and erratic President.

314 Action Fund

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7a10/4bd7760e/50181b5f/77a90bff/1476542495/VEsHBQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter&source=314_EM_PT_200723_6M2xO_none_2_fauciletter")** to make a donation.

To get text message updates from 314 Action text 314 to 31498.

name: Vote-by-mail Alert (via Blue Georgia)
subject: Barack and Michelle need you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Every single voice needs to be heard at the ballot box this November.
| | |

This is urgent, friend:**Republicans are attacking voting rights across the country and trying to BLOCK vote-by-mail in the midst of a pandemic - forcing Americans to choose between their health and their rights.**

name: Kathy Manning
subject: How McConnell can really honor John Lewis' legacy:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Right now, we need to answer Rep. Lewis' call to make "good trouble."
|
---

| | Over the weekend, we lost an American hero in Rep. John Lewis. I was fortunate enough to have met Rep. Lewis on the campaign trail. I am still in awe of his passion, dignity, humanity, and complete and total commitment to fighting for what's right, including Americans' right to vote. [_**Tell Mitch McConnell to honor John Lewis ' legacy by taking action on legislation that will protect voting rights ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2eb/3d199a51/2f500957/7364a79c/148863519/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200724pet_b") | [](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2eb/3d199a51/2f500957/7364a79c/148863519/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200724pet_b")
---
John Lewis dedicated his life to fighting for the right to vote. In 1965, as a leader of the Civil Rights Movement, he bravely demonstrated for voting rights in Selma, Alabama, enduring brutal beatings. As a dedicated member of Congress, he fought tirelessly for the Voting Rights Act.
But unfortunately, the VRA was gutted by the Supreme Court in 2013. Today, voter suppression tactics like restrictive ID laws and partisan gerrymandering pose huge barriers to the ballot box and effectively disenfranchise voters, particularly Black voters.
Democrats advanced a measure through the House that would right those wrongs by restoring the VRA, implementing automatic voter registration, and expanding voting by mail, and they want to name it in Rep. Lewis' honor.
**But there 's someone standing in the way: Mitch McConnell.**
[_**For more than a year, the measure to restore the Voting Rights Act has been stuck in Mitch McConnell 's Senate. Add your name today and tell McConnell to take action to protect voting rights.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2eb/3d199a51/2f500957/7364a79c/148863519/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200724pet_b")
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2eb/3d199a51/2f500957/7364a79c/148863519/VEsC/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200724pet_b")
---
Our right to vote is sacred and critically important to the future of this country. Yet some people in positions of power are working hard to deprive us of that very right.
That means we need to fight twice as hard -- and as Rep. Lewis said, make "good trouble" \-- to protect that sacred right.
[_**Add your name to mine and demand McConnell take action in the Senate to restore the Voting Rights Act.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2eb/3d199a51/2f500957/7364a79c/148863519/VEsD/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200724pet_b")
Thank you,
Kathy
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2eb/3d199a51/2f500957/7364a79c/148863519/VEsA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200724pet_b")
---

body:

| | **_[SIGN THE CARD: USPS workers across the country are risking everything to make lifesaving deliveries during this crisis. But Donald Trump is gunning to take away their jobs and defund the Postal Service. To ruin Trump's plan and show overwhelming appreciation for the USPS, we want to collect 20,000 signatures THANKING America's wonderful postal workers. Will you sign before midnight? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b352/18e32a7f/4dac1d99/7b212367/3859971867/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/Thank-USPS-postcard?source=20200710_em_pet_b1_udv_90")_** | **[SIGN THE CARD: Thank our postal workers >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b352/18e32a7f/4dac1d99/7b212367/3859971867/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/Thank-USPS-postcard?source=20200710_em_pet_b1_udv_90")**

Our postal workers need our appreciation now more than ever.

They're on the front lines of this crisis -- risking their lives rushing critical medicine and supplies all over the country.

They're making these deliveries KNOWING Trump is trying to bankrupt them -- KNOWING they could lose their jobs if he succeeds.

Postal workers aren't getting an ounce of appreciation from Trump.

[**So we need to step up and make sure they know how grateful Americans are.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b352/18e32a7f/4dac1d99/7b212367/3859971867/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://act.benraylujan.com/page/s/Thank-USPS-postcard?source=20200710_em_pet_b1_udv_90")

Team Ben Ray

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b352/18e32a7f/4dac1d99/7b212318/3859971867/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b352/18e32a7f/4dac1d99/7b212319/3859971867/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b352/18e32a7f/4dac1d99/7b21231e/3859971867/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b352/18e32a7f/4dac1d99/7b21231a/3859971867/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b352/18e32a7f/4dac1d99/7b212364/3859971867/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. name: Darin LaHood
subject: This could decide the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
We can’t afford to get this wrong. The upcoming election is about bringing jobs back, supporting businesses, and making sure that our economy comes... [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=56811412edc44344a7569acff08a207d&_e=1JCwRRmwY55toXu4qJ7wSdM5-kQOLEONPmSxRUFV1hoZTzvVjANJK53IHkIAGXbfnb7Yna2ilupjxsRIGER_8Q1uaLjZlXmHk7Qd32F-reipXKSahtEF_exd_Cg3fP8ZwpBrP5S09ckymVCxUIueImAN46v6WzhLGMfLcnB5XMOAxfxdEeP-_TEkGPiAyhefxBUb5bFLKGry29Seq9JZrG05nlxw76NZE32XF8Jr3e1a1xNwLKMoNQaIEuIhPySgLAKCeMmoSJQB92xx86cMD4xZjiywmXPJEiyHanURmnkAiLVC6HdYfMn_9GKH15LoEO3GUky5J1BKg9jRDK0fFJaABt6SJQoSc5yO27e9KTY1I_1fUDjkyQxaKIKK1zbGHCll8R76ZWi-hKcffcu4kPX0Z3o-Rx_tZYobLrHXnmtxTxWm2sCIgAIxk9I76BFfsKGcS8pt_QOVMfIWf4jqKtndexQ2QLUpKEw_sNePu5s%3D) Friend, **Have you seen the latest presidential election polls?**
I just got done looking through what the polls are saying, and one thing jumped out at me that I want to ask you about.
The economy is shaping up to be a critical deciding factor for Americans at the ballot box this year – and with the coronavirus continuing to pose new challenges to our recovery, I want to know where you stand on this one question:
**Who do you believe would be better for our economy – President Trump or Joe Biden?**
**[PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=56811412edc44344a7569acff08a207d&_e=1JCwRRmwY55toXu4qJ7wSdM5-kQOLEONPmSxRUFV1hoZTzvVjANJK53IHkIAGXbfkP8ZEgU-bQdSyPAirG10a7IfZ_g4EXKVLmplMLzYDasyzQYfYApErOSd1mDrwANw5NeHcFdYrez4bC_ZXW-PWWaXZx8ssV-YEJwItZrtR2kVFt5gxJpa5-YMkf7RF_CwKGrsQ-OBgKqVrBCzpH5BwoBKQpinO-bX_Y9PC67UicZK2Bh25bhegU6TjOoSerxY8whnbhWGLbq84IyHKwe6ZowqjxiOobPxJYU-NuCsKnCjO2V7xZedBrSQdl6r6t959E0x2NzMgy0OE-jjxuTqCNOjyr6-xhlcWHJtA3q5Z3xi66Abifu0ajP_gLr-dtVUQWG3QGrKWVTLXTnTL0eKSK1Ju40hq26Lum9m3woF3Os8WJxHsh8xFpTc5MyPDCsm92KU5Q5bItAtttjnINISbtJWdD3vUIyAFax5srxxKa_E0YoTQU-R43xbGLJfE2pAbYOWBoHUfx3lL3GNYXvdO29-MlnlZ2Htqh4wj0kT6ey99H6tVPZ0mmKxzwxEJyCHE0t0qKIQERCnI0P11wgtxX0yx3flmKA0ag1qkJPPbw5LXoc_GI0oxJ97gLaSMNCW9xu_jh6ZP86GqIAyYezJTYA4AY8B1B1WiNdf4QJVY-AfFzBu-Zc0LFW1wBfzVAbK)** **[JOE BIDEN](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=56811412edc44344a7569acff08a207d&_e=1JCwRRmwY55toXu4qJ7wSdM5-kQOLEONPmSxRUFV1hoZTzvVjANJK53IHkIAGXbfkP8ZEgU-bQdSyPAirG10a7IfZ_g4EXKVLmplMLzYDasyzQYfYApErOSd1mDrwANw5NeHcFdYrez4bC_ZXW-PWWaXZx8ssV-YEJwItZrtR2kVFt5gxJpa5-YMkf7RF_CwKGrsQ-OBgKqVrBCzpH5BwoBKQpinO-bX_Y9PC67UicZK2Bh25bhegU6TjOoSerxY8whnbhWGLbq84IyHKwe6ZkPgnFUdp0NCryLxpjVRmo8DEfjytd-2jWaq0K8BbUjQv78djP15oMgPNOy1TAtkwrR1eMadFlploGp_-F-O2Ew9RmlbUnaqRRLL65uNIsG62r-SuXt3QgqCU80eGiNdXYaj2fSV2JjRBFXdSY91DYYW4jumOt7AmIstEwmM_6XFpf07KLa6MjXSZXq9THyDR6oytiZOgPcqBFWyWvRIhvzxa_WO15XhXBAa9qi2kl2Q8a4j1scOl8xn-ynVvVoaE8ORNu6F1DtH2lIhNfCRZvCExgvZ8rB3laslOEHYKNMfaZEupQ-oaIWyfhOtPVf9qx7RUueKdYpyQh8JYp082zSNWNGEuYshDAFm5xoUmtIBa4VWOjmKkxY5VRheMCyr6dmhpc8fOt9gzqe9T39gxFem77paf2UWgWjBxw-jVsoP)**

subject: Police Endorsement
body:
| A Message From Amanda Makki For congress | |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=f797e66347&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| | **American Fraternal Order of Police Backs Amanda Makki in Pinellas County** Today, the Fraternal Order of Police announced their endorsement for Amanda Makki, Republican primary candidate. With radical ideas like defunding our police, Florida police officers want to be sure they will be **fully funded and supported** by their representative. The Florida Fraternal Order of Police’s mission is _“t_ _o support and defend the Constitution of the United States, and the State of Florida, to inculcate loyalty and allegiance to the United States of America.”_ The Florida State Lodge of the Fraternal Order of Police currently serves nearly 20,000 members in 100 local lodges across the State. Pinellas Co. Lodges 10 and 43 overwhelmingly chose to support Amanda Makki’s candidacy for Congress to stand for law and order. _“Our communities need protection. With frightening rhetoric to assaulting our law enforcement, both physically and financially, Pinellas County officers need a strong voice to advocate for their integrity. Our police officers, and their loved ones, have my word to **stand for law and order**. They can count on me to be a loud voice of protection for them in Washington and here at home,” said Makki._
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=202a59c21d&e=ee1c0329b3)

| _Amanda has outraised all her primary opponents with over $1 million and is currently leading in the polls by 8 points. She is one of only 23 candidates nationwide to have earned NRCC Young Guns “Contender Status”, and her grassroots movement has amassed a vast list of conservative endorsements, including:_
* **House Republican Leader** **Kevin McCarthy**
* **Republican Whip** **Steve Scalise**
* **Congresswoman Elise Stefanik’s and E-PAC**
* **Senator Joni Ernst** , the first female combat veteran ever elected to the United States Senate
* **Congressmen** **Michael Waltz** (Lt. Colonel)
* **Congressman Neal Dunn **(Major)
* **Combat veteran** **Robert O’Neill** of the elite Navy SEAL Team 6, who shot Osama bin Laden
* **Florida State Representative** **Jamie Grant**
* **Seminole City Councilor** **Thom Barnhorn**
* **Treasure Island Commissioner** **Tyler Payne**
* **Belleair Beach Mayor** **Joseph Manzo**
* **Belleair Bluffs Mayor** **Chris Arbutine**
* **Treasure Island Mayor** **Larry Lunn**

_**Please contribute now** to Amanda Makki’s campaign to help flip this seat back to Republican control and to help her be one of the 17 candidates that will help take the gavel out of Nancy Pelosi’s hands and return the House back to Republican control this fall!_

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: What's best for students and teachers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
... that's a question on a lot of folks' minds right now. While there isn't a one-size-fits-all solution, the solution should not put students' and teachers' health at risk -- which is exactly what would happen if schools reopened without adhering to proper safety precautions.

Unfortunately, the Trump Administration is intent on completely disregarding public health concerns and moving full steam ahead to reopen public schools. With COVID-19 cases on the rise, reopening schools next month would endanger students, teachers, janitors, administrators, counselors, and students' family members.

That's why I've signed on to a petition demanding that schools stay closed until there are proper safety measures in place. Will you stand with me by signing your name?

Thank you for taking action,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Islamic Studies in our Schools?
body:
As the study of Christianity and Judaism is all but banned in public schools, Joe Biden stood in front of the audience of a packed, “Million Muslim Votes Summit” and said this
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385444-908692-5107870-d401a38138-6a85c225e3)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385444-908692-5107870-d401a38138-6a85c225e3) As the study of Christianity and Judaism is all but banned in public schools, Joe Biden stood in front of the audience of a packed, “Million Muslim Votes Summit” and said this:

**“One of the things that I think is important is I wish we taught more in our schools about the Islamic faith.”**
You may be outraged by that, but yes, let’s go there and teach our children about the Islamic faith and ALL about Sharia Law . . .

Shall we teach our children about Hudud – the punishments for violating Islamic law?

Will we teach them that the punishment for homosexuality is stoning a man to death?

Should we enlighten our little girls that while they are in school, in most Islamic nations, young women are prohibited from obtaining an education and have illiteracy rates of 70%?

Do we teach them that Sharia Law is TOTALLY INCOMPATIABLE with individual rights and liberties?

Should we teach them about public lashings with a demonstration in the High School gym?

Of course Joe Biden and the Democrats would never allow such lessons in our public schools. But if the audience he was speaking to got their way, we wouldn’t just be teaching those lessons, **we would be LIVING those lessons**.

I’m running for Congress to take a firm stand against Democrats that would sell out our American values for votes from people who want to fundamentally change our nation.

[**Help me win by donating today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385444-908692-5107870-d401a38138-6a85c225e3)
[**Support my campaign so I can stand in the halls of Congress and draw a line in the sand to confront this covert takeover of our government that’s sneaking in like a Trojan horse to take over our American values.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385444-908692-5107870-d401a38138-6a85c225e3)

As an investigative journalist, I’ve proven I’m willing to stand unwavering against anyone who attempts to undermine our nation.

I’ve confronted them all. To Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, Linda Sarsour from AOC.

I’ve exposed their hypocrisy to the point where they literally ran away when they saw me coming . . . just as AOC sprinted across the street to avoid me.

Picture me in Congress and help me get there.

**When I’m a member of Congress, they won’t be able to run away.[Donate all that you can today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-385444-908692-5107870-d401a38138-6a85c225e3)**

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: America is on a dangerous path
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress |

As a 1st Generation American, I grew up on the stories of my family’s experience under Castro’s TOTALITARIAN Cuba. Many people in Miami share a similar story of tragedy and mistreatment that they or their family received under socialist regimes throughout Latin America.
That’s why it’s incredibly insulting when I see many young people donning apparel that has the communist _**Hammer and Sickle**_ , _**Che Guevera**_ , and _**Fidel Castro**_. Even worse, these cultural Marxists, being led by AOC and the Socialist Squad, are pushing for the same socialist nightmare that many from our community escaped.
Peter, I’m hoping that the majority of Americans still support the American Dream and would reject this socialist nightmare. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. **[America is at a crossroads and I need your input. Do you still believe in the American Dream or should we lean into the socialist policies pushed by The Squad and AOC?](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=72d8d6839a0c4d16a6befbb9824b951f&_e=iJtrNeRdwx-LpIHj9XfMb9a0ul4_6eg34OKRzrW54n2HppSF4nQE1pxt9cUv6rfl5vXmr5_YF9HJHXsArPO297ioVF2MscOiZaekJMuyaL-blsClqlwBAQo8uGLM8ApDSV2Be2XHeMxnx4aJii2IV0574RxucYh2dJjut9gCFFr1FAYwp9I6OP4KS35lFA64z-fLT2JQ0F6gSLi39Ik4RycNZhTbf6YkOjHRKLQKjPSaygmzy5l5YmXuzlKUegSuEb_sK7n0BjpxyL1d0N1VqAklvNebYAf2jViQhklAUswMqkZDN7j2Prhj8k_tYQk-4Jdm5EMl-gNsEEIHjbuTtFKDSWtl3AZvJK-m2Yv7Ux8-NMyoUpL1RGHVCM76WOgc_NZMRNrVsF0dW98kPnKzIqqJcZZW9x0jogbCkkWp3JE%3D)** **📋 American Direction Poll 📋**

name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: I need your feedback!
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.133080.aspx)
Dear Peter,
I hope you are staying safe and well during this time! I have a favor to ask! With all of the conversation and excitement over the presidential election, I was hoping you could answer a few questions for me! I really want to understand the general feeling out there and have created a brief survey. The survey should only take a few minutes.

Would you mind filling this out? [https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/3M2QJN2](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/30.133080.aspx)

I look forward to seeing you all again soon!

**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.133080.aspx)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Schools must reopen, California restricts worship, a president that keeps his promises, and more
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20206-ff038e90ed2f4a4d925d616e1f93e510/79/447/55ae7cc5-317a-4944-a637-71e3c647dbf1)** We have, yet again, started a nationwide movement... As we've been fighting to reopen our nation and restart our great American economy, there has been one point of emphasis that we believe must happen to get our nation back on the right track: our children MUST return to school. Therefore, we must reopen schools in the fall. We wholeheartedly believe that this simple action is vital for our continued social and economic recovery. The science is on our side, the American people are on our side, it is the right move. Many, across the political spectrum, have heard our calls to reopen schools and many are joining the movement. The facts are clear. To avoid endangering our children, we must reopen schools. [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjA2LWZmMDM4ZTkwZWQyZjRhNGQ5MjVkNjE2ZTFmOTNlNTEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjAvanVsLzIzL3RvLWF2b2lkLWVuZGFuZ2VyaW5nLWNoaWxkcmVuLXJlb3Blbi1zY2hvb2xzLW5vdy8_bWlkPTQyNDI2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=l8N7LXbQeED0Evs9BK_-lw) **[To avoid endangering children, reopen schools now](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjA2LWZmMDM4ZTkwZWQyZjRhNGQ5MjVkNjE2ZTFmOTNlNTEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjAvanVsLzIzL3RvLWF2b2lkLWVuZGFuZ2VyaW5nLWNoaWxkcmVuLXJlb3Blbi1zY2hvb2xzLW5vdy8_bWlkPTQyNDI2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=OfBwN27M_jlotCirmtTHyA)**
Fall is coming, and with its impending arrival decisions are being made all over the country on how best to reopen the nation’s schools. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjA2LWZmMDM4ZTkwZWQyZjRhNGQ5MjVkNjE2ZTFmOTNlNTEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjAvanVsLzIzL3RvLWF2b2lkLWVuZGFuZ2VyaW5nLWNoaWxkcmVuLXJlb3Blbi1zY2hvb2xzLW5vdy8_bWlkPTQyNDI2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Fj6IJutOzwtzHRIgVNy1tg)** | |
---
As Congress prepares to take up yet another bloated, fiscally-irresponsible coronavirus bill, our message to President Trump is clear.

**Mr. President, please do not sign another coronavirus bill, unless it:**
* **Curbs out of control spending**
* **Gives us a payroll tax holiday**
* **Stops paying people not to work**
* **Provides incentives to reopen schools**

If you agree with these 4 necessary steps, [we urge you to email the White House](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjA2LWZmMDM4ZTkwZWQyZjRhNGQ5MjVkNjE2ZTFmOTNlNTEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvY29udGFjdD9taWQ9NDI0MjYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Wt4ACnEjnMF1VNEZ_bV_DQ). Please encourage the President to stand strong and accept nothing less than the necessary steps he has already called for. Our businesses, our children, and our nation as a whole are depending on him.
|
---
Things that drive us crazy? Democrat politicians attempting to restrict their constituents’ freedom of religion. And that is exactly what we saw in the state of California this past week.

This week California Governor Gavin Newsom tried to restrict freedom of religion across the state of California, effectively banning all indoor church services and in-home Bible studies.

The Governor did this, while hiding behind the excuse of it being in the interest of public health, essentially arguing Churches were non-essential. But like many believers across the state, some of the local churches saw through his excuse and filed suit against the Governor, calling his measure unconstitutional.

Saying, “We’ve been essential for 2,000 years.”

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjA2LWZmMDM4ZTkwZWQyZjRhNGQ5MjVkNjE2ZTFmOTNlNTEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdXMvY2FsaWZvcm5pYS1jaHVyY2gtbmV3c29tLWNvcm9uYXZpcnVzLXdvcnNoaXAtYmFuP21pZD00MjQyNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=0f1RShXLwXzD7GwFaofUVg)

**[California church network sues Gov. Newsom over ban on worship, home Bible studies](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjA2LWZmMDM4ZTkwZWQyZjRhNGQ5MjVkNjE2ZTFmOTNlNTEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdXMvY2FsaWZvcm5pYS1jaHVyY2gtbmV3c29tLWNvcm9uYXZpcnVzLXdvcnNoaXAtYmFuP21pZD00MjQyNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=RoB1-KIhtvlbp0PYw73qnA)**
A network of California churches filed a lawsuit against Gov. Gavin Newsom on Friday, defying the state's coronavirus lockdown orders against holding indoor church services while state officials encourage protests. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjA2LWZmMDM4ZTkwZWQyZjRhNGQ5MjVkNjE2ZTFmOTNlNTEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdXMvY2FsaWZvcm5pYS1jaHVyY2gtbmV3c29tLWNvcm9uYXZpcnVzLXdvcnNoaXAtYmFuP21pZD00MjQyNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=DWdhU53foTpRYS1Iwnt3Nw)**
|
---
Promises Made, Promises Kept!

Much to the dismay of Democrats, this week President Trump issued a directive instructing the Secretary of Commerce to discount illegal immigrants in the US census for the purpose of apportionment in Congress.

President Trump saw through the Democrats’ plan regarding the census, illegal immigrants and congressional seats -- and was not about to let Democrats compromise the integrity of our elections or dilute the representation of states who do not have large illegal populations.

This is the right move by the President and yet another reason why Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund is working so hard to re-elect the President.

As Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund continues its fight to re-elect President Trump with its 2020 Patriot Project, we need your help.

For more information on what you can do to help re-elect President Trump, please check out the link below:

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjA2LWZmMDM4ZTkwZWQyZjRhNGQ5MjVkNjE2ZTFmOTNlNTEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3BhdHJpb3Rwcm9qZWN0Lz9taWQ9NDI0MjYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=xQHpmKD9IHWJyXIgKY6SxA)

Do you want to help Donald Trump win re-election in November? Are you eager to help protect the Republicans’ majority in the Senate and save the Supreme Court? If so, then this is the election year project for you! **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjA2LWZmMDM4ZTkwZWQyZjRhNGQ5MjVkNjE2ZTFmOTNlNTEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3BhdHJpb3Rwcm9qZWN0Lz9taWQ9NDI0MjYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=n6AFzTIEK1hfu40WgDVvUQ)**

body:
Topeka Mayor Michelle De La Isla was endorsed by the Anti-Gun Brady PAC | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Patriot,

This week, we received news that the likely Democratic opponent for the Second District, Topeka Mayor Michelle De La Isla, was **endorsed by the Anti-Gun Brady PAC**. [Would you consider donating now to let the gun-grabbers know we won't stand for this in Kansas?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=00703a85fe&e=1050d051da)

See what they had to say about her:
---
|
---
| We know she is going to be a tough candidate to beat in November, **backed by Nancy Pelosi and the far left** , and we know _**Jake LaTurner is the only candidate who can beat her**_. Last week, polling showed **Steve Watkins losing to Michelle De La Isla by[12 points](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=390a9ed69b&e=1050d051da).**
---
| That is unacceptable, we cannot afford to lose another inch of ground in the House.

Jake LaTurner has an A+ from the NRA, he is endorsed by the National Association of Gun Rights, and he was at the center of passing Constitutional Carry for Kansas.

**_Jake LaTurner will stop the gun grabbers from taking away your guns in Kansas._** This is why we are asking for you to help us with a [donation to the campaign.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=6c73309a5c&e=1050d051da)

_We know the left is Targeting Kansas._ Your contribution will help us win in August, and **keep the anti-gun groups out of Kansas.**

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update July 17-July 24
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=93A138A14A880)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK

Friend,

We are just a few short months away from November and our energy is rising by the hour. We are incredibly thankful for all of your continued support as we get into the real heat of things - and I’m not just talking about the weather!

We are spending every day ensuring that no rock remains unturned in the fight for a fair and safe election this, and ultimately every, cycle.

Over the weekend, I had the opportunity to speak with Matt Boyle on Breitbart News Saturday where I discussed the susceptibility to fraud that mail-in ballots bring - specifically relating to the estimated 24 million ineligible voters that receive ballots with this new push. [You can listen or read about the interview HERE >>](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=93A138A14A884)

Please don’t forget our push for [Call your County](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=93A138A14A885) \- our initiate to hold your counties accountable and get the specific election protocol from each.

We can’t express our gratitude enough for your continued commitment in this fight and are thankful to be able to fight next to and for each and every one of you in this battle.

Onward,
Catherine

| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | NEWS TO KNOW

1\. GOP wins major 'election integrity' lawsuit in Florida, where Dems sought taxpayer-funded mail-in ballots
Republicans on Monday appeared to soundly defeat a Democratic-led legal effort to force taxpayers in Florida to fund mail-in ballot postage fees, eliminate ballot-return deadlines and strike down laws restricting the practice of "ballot harvesting" – which allows political operatives to retrieve vote-by-mail ballots en masse and return them to polling places. [https://www.foxnews.com/politics/gop-wins-major-election-integrity-lawsuit-in-florida-where-dems-sought-taxpayer-funded-mail-in-ballots](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=93A138A14A875)

2\. Nearly 50% Of Americans Believe Mail-In Voting Is Vulnerable To Significant Levels Of Fraud: Poll
Nearly 50% of American voters believe mail-in voting is likely to result in significant fraud as officials search for ways to secure the electoral system amid the coronavirus pandemic, a Washington Post/ABC poll published Sunday found

Only 43% of people [surveyed](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=93A138A14A876) in the poll think there are adequate protections against potential instances of fraud. The WaPo/ABC poll also showed that 38% of Americans say they prefer to vote through mail, while another 59% want to vote in person. By contrast, 24% of Americans voted by mail in 2016, ABC [reported](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=93A138A14A877), citing data from the U.S. Election Assistance Commission. [https://dailycaller.com/2020/07/19/donald-trump-joe-biden-polls-mail-in-ballots/](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=93A138A14A878)

3\. 2020 US presidential poll will be the most litigated in American historyA recent count by Loyola Marymount University law professor Justin Levitt found 154 cases already filed across 41 states and the District of Columbia. Many more are expected in the months ahead as Republicans, Democrats and advocacy groups battle over how to vote during a pandemic. [https://www.livemint.com/news/world/2020-us-presidential-poll-will-be-the-most-litigated-in-american-history-11595237792575.html](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=93A138A14A879)
