subject: True leadership in the face of misogyny.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5f30463ec5&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend --

Yesterday, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez requested, sought, and was granted recognition for a matter of personal privilege on the House floor to address the derogatory and misogynistic comments hurled by Rep. Ted Yoho and witnessed by Rep. Roger Williams several days ago. Rep. Ocasio-Cortez was articulate, gracious, and accurate in her statements regarding the experience of women and the aggressive actions against women in the workplace and our culture.

Rep. Yoho’s comments are indicative of a larger systemic problem, one that supports abusive and violent language against women. The verbal assault Rep. Ocasio-Cortez experienced by Rep. Yoho in the presence of another male is way too prevalent and normative. Rep. Ocasio-Cortez has an important message regarding the profound change required by the country on these matters. She used her authority as a sitting Congresswoman for the good of the country. Though directed at her as a personal attack, Rep. Ocasio-Cortez used this moment to respond to, educate, and call this nation to something better. This is leadership.

Jackie Walorski’s silence and failure to stand with her colleague is either an acceptance of male aggression towards women or a confirmation that she truly does not believe in equal rights for women in the workplace. On Feb. 13, 2020, Jackie stated on the floor of Congress, “...of course I believe in equal rights. Women should never face discrimination and harassment. I believe we should be empowering women and girls to achieve their dreams.”1 Yet she voted down H.J. Res 79, removing the deadline for ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment.

True leadership is speaking up when it’s the right thing to do, not when it’s convenient or politically advantageous. Jackie Walorski is not a leader.

[**Will you contribute $10, $25, $50 or more to help elect Pat Hackett—someone who will be a leader in Congress?**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a692c1faee&e=5886ca081d)

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Corky expands the lead, interview with OAN, Women for Trump, and more.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78da3bee80b192fc/cb1867a2f6119167c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78da3bee80b192fc/71fb0556dec087f8c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Poll Shows Corky In the Lead as September Primary Looms**
The week started off with great news, as we went public with the results of an internal campaign poll showing Corky Messner leading Don Bolduc for the GOP nomination.

As reported by WMUR-Channel 9, the poll shows Corky ahead by 12 percentage points with eight weeks to go before the Sept. 8 Republican U.S. Senate primary election.

The poll by the Tarrance Group July 12-14 surveyed 401 likely Republican voters and reports a margin of error of 5 percentage points. Results also showed that 39 percent of likely Republican primary voters would vote for Corky, with Bolduc at 27 percent. Support for Corky has increased by 20 percentage points since the firm conducted a prior poll in May.

An accompanying campaign memo by Messner senior campaign adviser, Michael Biundo, says the poll numbers, combined with Corky’s $3.2 million in cash on hand and his access to the Trump Victory ground organization following President Donald Trump’s June 12 endorsement, shows, “Only Corky Messner is in a position to defeat Jeanne Shaheen.”

Biundo pointed out to WMUR that Shaheen’s campaign ended the second quarter with $8.5 million cash on hand, as compared to $3.2 million for Messner and $179,000 for Bolduc.

“If the Republican nominee is not able to be on television and in mailboxes within days of securing the nomination, Shaheen and the Democrats will have a window of opportunity to define the Republican nominee in highly unfavorable terms,” Biundo wrote. “With the endorsement of President Trump, our strong poll numbers, the resources to run a complete campaign, and the strategy to simultaneously go after voters we need in the fall, our team feels we are on firm footing to win this race.”

**[Read more](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78da3bee80b192fc/7a5d8855983f66abc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** about the poll results.
|
---
**In the News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78da3bee80b192fc/915018952bc1b422c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky spoke to One America News Network this past week, explaining how proud he is of President Trump’s endorsement, and why he’s seeking to unseat Democrat U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen. **[Tune in](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78da3bee80b192fc/f675af5688eb50b0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** and learn more about how Corky will appeal to both New Hampshire Republicans and Independents to win the September GOP Primary.
|
---
**Corky Joins Women for Trump Events Across New Hampshire**
Corky took part in the ‘Women for Trump’ bus tour this week, joining Trump 2020 Senior Advisor Lara Trump, Trump 2020 Senior Advisor for Strategic Communications Mercedes Schlapp, Trump 2020 Senior Advisor Katrina Pierson, and National Co-Chair of Women for Trump and Former Florida Attorney General, the Honorable Pam Bondi. The bus tour traveled throughout Maine and New Hampshire, and engaged voters through roundtables, meet-and-greets, and sit-downs with business owners and local leaders across the two states.
|
---
**State Rep. Kim Rice, Major GOP Activist Mark Vincent, 16-Term Rep. Ken Weyler and Other GOP Notables are Among Latest Messner Endorsers**
State Rep. Kim Rice of Hudson, GOP activist Mark Vincent, and 16-term State Rep. Kenneth Weyler have announced their endorsement of Corky Messner. The campaign also welcomed State Rep.Thomas Walsh, former State Rep. Steve Schmidt, Tanya Donnelly, Philip Abirached, Jim Thompson, Bernard Wilensky, and Teresa Wright to its group of endorsers.

Rice is serving her third term in the House and is Republican Policy Leader. The mother of seven, she has long been involved in issues related to family law, parental rights, and juvenile justice. She was an early endorser of Don Bolduc of Stratham.

“It has become apparent that Corky Messner is the candidate we need facing Senator Jeanne Shaheen in November,” says Rice. “He has the resources to mount a successful effort to unseat this powerful incumbent, but more importantly, he has a positive message that resonates with voters.”

Mark Vincent, former area vice chair of the New Hampshire Republican Committee and former chair of the Hillsborough County Republican Committee, was an early endorser of former N.H. House Speaker Bill O’Brien, who dropped out of the nomination race and endorsed Messner in April. Explaining his support of Corky, Vincent points out, “Corky’s focus on individual liberties and economic freedom reflects the common sense conservative values of Granite Staters, and his business experience and leadership skills will serve him well as our next U.S. Senator.”

Rep. Kenneth Weyler of Kingston represents Rockingham District 13 and is serving his 16th term in the House. He is a U.S. Air Force veteran and retired airline pilot.

Other endorsers:
* Rep. Thomas Walsh of Hooksett (Merrimack-Dist. 24) is serving his third term and sits on the Transportation Committee.
* Former Rep. Steve Schmidt of Wolfeboro represented Carroll District 6 from 2010 to 2018 and served as Deputy Majority Leader in 2015.
* Tanya Donnelly of Salem is running for election to the New Hampshire House of Representatives to represent Rockingham 8.
* Philip Abirached of Windham is a small business owner in Derry and a GOP activist.
* Jim Thompson of Wolfeboro is involved in his local community and is a longtime GOP activist.
* Bernard Wilensky of Wolfeboro is an Army veteran and member of Chapter 54 of the Special Forces Association.
* Teresa Wright is a GOP activist in Belknap County.

|
---
**The Corky Store is Now Open!**
The **[Corky for Senate store](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/78da3bee80b192fc/2d56d9dc45607befc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** is NOW OPEN - have you checked it out yet? Show everyone you support Corky by getting your official campaign shirt today, and be sure to check back regularly, since we’ll be adding to our selection in the weeks to come.

clean_body: Tap or click to read more >> Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. | | Poll Shows Corky In the Lead as September Primary Looms The week started off with great news, as we went public with the results of an internal campaign poll showing Corky Messner leading Don Bolduc for the GOP nomination. As reported by WMUR-Channel 9, the poll shows Corky ahead by 12 percentage points with eight weeks to go before the Sept. 8 Republican U.S. Senate primary election. The poll by the Tarrance Group July 12-14 surveyed 401 likely Republican voters and reports a margin of error of 5 percentage points. Results also showed that 39 percent of likely Republican primary voters would vote for Corky, with Bolduc at 27 percent. Support for Corky has increased by 20 percentage points since the firm conducted a prior poll in May. An accompanying campaign memo by Messner senior campaign adviser, Michael Biundo, says the poll numbers, combined with Corky’s $3.2 million in cash on hand and his access to the Trump Victory ground organization following President Donald Trump’s June 12 endorsement, shows, “Only Corky Messner is in a position to defeat Jeanne Shaheen.” Biundo pointed out to WMUR that Shaheen’s campaign ended the second quarter with $8.5 million cash on hand, as compared to $3.2 million for Messner and $179,000 for Bolduc. “If the Republican nominee is not able to be on television and in mailboxes within days of securing the nomination, Shaheen and the Democrats will have a window of opportunity to define the Republican nominee in highly unfavorable terms,” Biundo wrote. “With the endorsement of President Trump, our strong poll numbers, the resources to run a complete campaign, and the strategy to simultaneously go after voters we need in the fall, our team feels we are on firm footing to win this race.” about the poll results. | In the News Corky spoke to One America News Network this past week, explaining how proud he is of President Trump’s endorsement, and why he’s seeking to unseat Democrat U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen. and learn more about how Corky will appeal to both New Hampshire Republicans and Independents to win the September GOP Primary. | Corky Joins Women for Trump Events Across New Hampshire Corky took part in the ‘Women for Trump’ bus tour this week, joining Trump 2020 Senior Advisor Lara Trump, Trump 2020 Senior Advisor for Strategic Communications Mercedes Schlapp, Trump 2020 Senior Advisor Katrina Pierson, and National Co-Chair of Women for Trump and Former Florida Attorney General, the Honorable Pam Bondi. The bus tour traveled throughout Maine and New Hampshire, and engaged voters through roundtables, meet-and-greets, and sit-downs with business owners and local leaders across the two states. | State Rep. Kim Rice, Major GOP Activist Mark Vincent, 16-Term Rep. Ken Weyler and Other GOP Notables are Among Latest Messner Endorsers State Rep. Kim Rice of Hudson, GOP activist Mark Vincent, and 16-term State Rep. Kenneth Weyler have announced their endorsement of Corky Messner. The campaign also welcomed State Rep.Thomas Walsh, former State Rep. Steve Schmidt, Tanya Donnelly, Philip Abirached, Jim Thompson, Bernard Wilensky, and Teresa Wright to its group of endorsers. Rice is serving her third term in the House and is Republican Policy Leader. The mother of seven, she has long been involved in issues related to family law, parental rights, and juvenile justice. She was an early endorser of Don Bolduc of Stratham. “It has become apparent that Corky Messner is the candidate we need facing Senator Jeanne Shaheen in November,” says Rice. “He has the resources to mount a successful effort to unseat this powerful incumbent, but more importantly, he has a positive message that resonates with voters.” Mark Vincent, former area vice chair of the New Hampshire Republican Committee and former chair of the Hillsborough County Republican Committee, was an early endorser of former N.H. House Speaker Bill O’Brien, who dropped out of the nomination race and endorsed Messner in April. Explaining his support of Corky, Vincent points out, “Corky’s focus on individual liberties and economic freedom reflects the common sense conservative values of Granite Staters, and his business experience and leadership skills will serve him well as our next U.S. Senator.” Rep. Kenneth Weyler of Kingston represents Rockingham District 13 and is serving his 16th term in the House. He is a U.S. Air Force veteran and retired airline pilot. Other endorsers: Rep. Thomas Walsh of Hooksett (Merrimack-Dist. 24) is serving his third term and sits on the Transportation Committee. Former Rep. Steve Schmidt of Wolfeboro represented Carroll District 6 from 2010 to 2018 and served as Deputy Majority Leader in 2015. Tanya Donnelly of Salem is running for election to the New Hampshire House of Representatives to represent Rockingham 8. Philip Abirached of Windham is a small business owner in Derry and a GOP activist. Jim Thompson of Wolfeboro is involved in his local community and is a longtime GOP activist. Bernard Wilensky of Wolfeboro is an Army veteran and member of Chapter 54 of the Special Forces Association. Teresa Wright is a GOP activist in Belknap County. | The Corky Store is Now Open! The is NOW OPEN - have you checked it out yet? Show everyone you support Corky by getting your official campaign shirt today, and be sure to check back regularly, since we’ll be adding to our selection in the weeks to come. | IMPORTANT CORONAVIRUS SUPPORT INFO HEALTH INFORMATION New Hampshire Department of Health & Human Services Fact Sheet – . "" | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Who should pay for the riots?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LaZtIRoojQ7vKrfhVWktS8vmInt19xbFxt86hmTBD-Rc3gAQk8Kjekm3rPvstKhFaeSV_WqI5rZQ3QwfwzpL7EHw-XF5DR73ieT4Azkyxk7Gzs8BmuCOEP1q9aDdtjhUZxFulRfq23Y03kFgTeGlKtoUA6IB8mVo_vPkuKgsSfPkFeaupIW_0mBsHJEcJA5Tt8ksQRjeLWE=&c=DWhu6PCN1OCoz0CrkjTJw0c7EBuQM-KaKPYQ0OAkP3OmMXImW0IwXQ==&ch=r1Wgz9aKfuooBi-FmjkoapQRiGXfG5Pp8jwP--nHHBcWGdbQKM0IFQ==)
---
| Patriot,
Democrats and their inaction on the violent riots that broke out across the country have led to entire neighborhoods being destroyed, businesses burned to the ground, and innocent lives lost.
Now, they are asking for federal aid - American tax dollars - to clean up the mess.
[Today I'm asking that you join me in demanding that not one dollar of taxpayer money go to cities that let these violent mobs get out of hand.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LaZtIRoojQ7vKrfhVWktS8vmInt19xbFxt86hmTBD-Rc3gAQk8Kjekm3rPvstKhFaeSV_WqI5rZQ3QwfwzpL7EHw-XF5DR73ieT4Azkyxk7Gzs8BmuCOEP1q9aDdtjhUZxFulRfq23Y03kFgTeGlKtoUA6IB8mVo_vPkuKgsSfPkFeaupIW_0mBsHJEcJA5Tt8ksQRjeLWE=&c=DWhu6PCN1OCoz0CrkjTJw0c7EBuQM-KaKPYQ0OAkP3OmMXImW0IwXQ==&ch=r1Wgz9aKfuooBi-FmjkoapQRiGXfG5Pp8jwP--nHHBcWGdbQKM0IFQ==) These Democrat-run cities made their beds, and now they need to lie in them.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LaZtIRoojQ7vKrfhVWktS8vmInt19xbFxt86hmTBD-Rc3gAQk8Kjekm3rPvstKhFaeSV_WqI5rZQ3QwfwzpL7EHw-XF5DR73ieT4Azkyxk7Gzs8BmuCOEP1q9aDdtjhUZxFulRfq23Y03kFgTeGlKtoUA6IB8mVo_vPkuKgsSfPkFeaupIW_0mBsHJEcJA5Tt8ksQRjeLWE=&c=DWhu6PCN1OCoz0CrkjTJw0c7EBuQM-KaKPYQ0OAkP3OmMXImW0IwXQ==&ch=r1Wgz9aKfuooBi-FmjkoapQRiGXfG5Pp8jwP--nHHBcWGdbQKM0IFQ==)
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION: NO FEDERAL AID TO CITIES WHO STOOD DOWN TO THE MOB](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LaZtIRoojQ7vKrfhVWktS8vmInt19xbFxt86hmTBD-Rc3gAQk8Kjekm3rPvstKhFaeSV_WqI5rZQ3QwfwzpL7EHw-XF5DR73ieT4Azkyxk7Gzs8BmuCOEP1q9aDdtjhUZxFulRfq23Y03kFgTeGlKtoUA6IB8mVo_vPkuKgsSfPkFeaupIW_0mBsHJEcJA5Tt8ksQRjeLWE=&c=DWhu6PCN1OCoz0CrkjTJw0c7EBuQM-KaKPYQ0OAkP3OmMXImW0IwXQ==&ch=r1Wgz9aKfuooBi-FmjkoapQRiGXfG5Pp8jwP--nHHBcWGdbQKM0IFQ==)
---
| Our country is facing an unprecedented economic downturn due to COVID-19, and any federal aid should go directly to American workers to help them get back on their feet. We should not be responsible for bailing out "woke" mayors who let their cities burn.
The Democrats have turned a blind eye to the destruction that has occurred in cities across the country, and they should not be rewarded with a bail-out.
I need you to sign this petition so that we can prevent our tax dollars from supporting lawlessness in the streets and the destruction of our country's history.
---
| | | [SIGN YOUR NAME HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LaZtIRoojQ7vKrfhVWktS8vmInt19xbFxt86hmTBD-Rc3gAQk8Kjekm3rPvstKhFaeSV_WqI5rZQ3QwfwzpL7EHw-XF5DR73ieT4Azkyxk7Gzs8BmuCOEP1q9aDdtjhUZxFulRfq23Y03kFgTeGlKtoUA6IB8mVo_vPkuKgsSfPkFeaupIW_0mBsHJEcJA5Tt8ksQRjeLWE=&c=DWhu6PCN1OCoz0CrkjTJw0c7EBuQM-KaKPYQ0OAkP3OmMXImW0IwXQ==&ch=r1Wgz9aKfuooBi-FmjkoapQRiGXfG5Pp8jwP--nHHBcWGdbQKM0IFQ==)
---
| Thank you for making your voice heard.
God Bless America,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Mark Warner + your health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
How we can protect health care for every Virginian.
|
---

| | Millions Have Lost Health Insurance in Pandemic-Driven Recession
-- The New York Times
Derek, this is unacceptable.

In just the first four months of the pandemic, **more than five million Americans lost their health care coverage** , many due to coronavirus layoffs. We're still in the middle of the coronavirus pandemic. This is the worst possible time for Virginians and their families to be uninsured.

Mark Warner believes in making sure every Virginian has access to quality and affordable care. And it's been a top priority of his in the Senate. To him, fighting for our health care means strengthening our existing laws, like the Affordable Care Act, working to lower the cost of health care and prescription drugs, and expanding access to those who need coverage.

**[Will you make a donation to Mark's re-election campaign so he can continue protecting our health care in the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb5/53d9897e/5468b94c/1c8859ab/4249584878/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-defendinghealthcare?refcode=20200724_f_1_nd__670__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

**Mark has always defended our health care, and he understands that things are different during the pandemic.** He's passed legislation expanding telehealth options to Virginians so they can get the care they need from their own homes when possible, and he's also working to ensure that folks can hang onto health care coverage they have through work.

Mark has defended the Affordable Care Act every chance he's gotten. Meanwhile, President Trump and Republicans in the Senate are doing their best to dismantle the ACA in the midst of a global pandemic -- without a proposed replacement. It's critical that we re-elect Mark and regain a Democratic majority in the Senate to block any attempted repeal of the ACA.

**[If you're able to, please contribute to Mark's campaign. Let's keep him in the Senate protecting our health care.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb5/53d9897e/5468b94c/1c8859aa/4249584878/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-defendinghealthcare?refcode=20200724_f_1_nd__670__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbb5/53d9897e/5468b94c/1c8859a9/4249584878/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY3MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-defendinghealthcare?refcode=20200724_f_1_nd__670__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

He's passed legislation expanding telehealth options to Virginians so they can get the care they need from their own homes when possible, and he's also working to ensure that folks can hang onto health care coverage they have through work. Mark has defended the Affordable Care Act every chance he's gotten. Meanwhile, President Trump and Republicans in the Senate are doing their best to dismantle the ACA in the midst of a global pandemic -- without a proposed replacement. It's critical that we re-elect Mark and regain a Democratic majority in the Senate to block any attempted repeal of the ACA. "" -- Team Warner | "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Petition: Stop Funding Anti-American Propaganda in Schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
I know you care deeply about the future of our country. We must ensure that future generations understand the greatness of America and learn to reject the anti-American propaganda from the 1619 Project.Click here to unsubscribe http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/CopyofAcousticCopyofSubscriptionCenter/CottonSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=43035680&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTgwMTkwNTIyMwS2&spReportId=MTgwMTkwNTIyMwS2
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMzU2ODAS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTkwNTIyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Recently, I alerted you to a dangerous anti-American campaign called the "1619 Project" being led by liberal activists at the New York Times.

This project is an effort to change curriculum in schools across America to teach our kids that the real founding of America wasn't in 1776—it was in 1619. The thesis of the project is that everything that America has ever done has been in support of racism and that America is a fundamentally wicked country.

This is nonsense. And it’s been debunked by historians. We cannot allow this propaganda to be taught in our schools.

That’s why I’ve introduced the Saving American History Act which would prohibit funding for schools seeking to indoctrinate our children with the anti-American 1619 Project’s lies.

Federal funding shouldn't help indoctrinate young Americans with this left-wing neo-marxist garbage.

Peter, do you agree?
Sign my petition to help prevent the indoctrination of our children. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMzU2ODAS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTkwNTIyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0
The NYT's 1619 Project is a divisive, false account of history.

America is the greatest country the world has ever seen. We liberated the world from tyranny, and we have created opportunities for hundreds of millions to pursue life, liberty, and happiness.

Peter, I want to get this anti-American trash out of our schools.
Sign my petition to help prevent the indoctrination of our children. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMzU2ODAS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTkwNTIyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0

Tom Cotton

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Need Your Help!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/need-your-help?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# I could use your help.

Early voting has started and we’re closing in on the Aug. 4 primary and everyone needs to get out and vote. But, it’s more than just you voting, I need you to call, text, email or use social media to contact your friends and family about my campaign and why you are voting for me to be Kansas’ next U.S. Senator.

Please talk to your friends and family about how I am a businessman and community leader who is stepping up to help his neighbors. Talk about my commitment to term limits and how I do not view the Senate as the next rung on the ladder. Talk about how I am running a positive campaign and that while my opponents seek to tear each other down, I am focused on what’s best for Kansas. Talk about my commitment to preserving our heritage and keeping our streets safe.

Share my social media channels ([Facebook](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=58632c9ad9&e=41f8e27552), [Twitter](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=0802dcd0e8&e=41f8e27552), [Instagram](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=7cf163d026&e=41f8e27552)), so your friends and family can learn more about my campaign. Above all share why you are supporting me and why you believe in my race for U.S. Senate.

[Click here](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=d8e3131320&e=41f8e27552) to learn where to vote.

With your help we can win on August 4 and beat Barbara Bollier in November!

Dave

_P.S. – Check out some photos from my stop in Yates Center today!_

---
| | | | | | | [](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=3ebac0f338&e=41f8e27552)
---
| | [](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=cbdaa67a24&e=41f8e27552)

Lindstrom for Senate1310A Westloop Pl # 353Manhattan, KS 66502-2842

name: Team Christy
subject: SIGN ON: Demand a fairer federal minimum wage NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

It's been exactly 11 years since the federal government raised the minimum wage.

That's just not ok.

And amidst a historic pandemic when we're all supposed to stay home if we can, **full-time workers earning that $7.25 an hour wage _still_ can't afford fair market housing.**

**[It's time to raise the federal minimum wage, Peter. Please, add your name to our petition calling on Congress to pass a higher minimum wage _now_ \-- together, we can demand change.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd74/29776869/908eda5/569e8e73/4053837397/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjRfbWlud2FnZS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_minwage?source=em20_200724_minwage-full")** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd74/29776869/908eda5/569e8e73/4053837397/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjRfbWlud2FnZS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_minwage?source=em20_200724_minwage-full") Studies show that the average American worker needs to earn **nearly $24 an hour** to afford rent on a modest, two-bedroom home.

So where does that leave the single mom working full-time to support her two kids? Or the son responsible for his aging parents who need care at home? Or the family who relied on two incomes before the pandemic, but are struggling now that someone has lost a job?

**It leaves them in the lurch.**

Here in California, we're lucky that our state minimum wage is already one of the highest in the nation -- and it will reach $15 an hour by 2022. But that's not soon enough for working families who are struggling during this public health crisis.

We need to speak out and demand a fairer federal minimum wage -- one that actually _works_ for working folks.

**[If you agree that we can't afford to wait for another year to go by before we raise the federal minimum wage, please add your support to our petition now.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bd74/29776869/908eda5/569e8e73/4053837397/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA3MjRfbWlud2FnZS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/s/2007_email_christy_minwage?source=em20_200724_minwage-full")**

Thanks for your support,

Team Christy

|

clean_body: | []() | | Peter -- It's been exactly 11 years since the federal government raised the minimum wage. That's just not ok. And amidst a historic pandemic when we're all supposed to stay home if we can, full-time workers earning that $7.25 an hour wage still can't afford fair market housing. "" "" Studies show that the average American worker needs to earn nearly $24 an hour to afford rent on a modest, two-bedroom home. So where does that leave the single mom working full-time to support her two kids? Or the son responsible for his aging parents who need care at home? Or the family who relied on two incomes before the pandemic, but are struggling now that someone has lost a job? It leaves them in the lurch. Here in California, we're lucky that our state minimum wage is already one of the highest in the nation -- and it will reach $15 an hour by 2022. But that's not soon enough for working families who are struggling during this public health crisis. We need to speak out and demand a fairer federal minimum wage -- one that actually works for working folks. "" Thanks for your support, Team Christy | "" Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. "" | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

name: Team Warren
subject: Unless Congress takes action right away, two key protections are about to expire: a national eviction moratorium and expanded unemployment insurance benefits.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
The national eviction moratorium ends today. Without an extension, millions of people could be out on the street. And extended unemployment coverage is set to end next week -- which would cut critical | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cf4/3768180179/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Elizabeth has laid out a plan (see below) for how Congress needs to respond to this public health and economic crisis.

**And unless Congress takes action right away, two key protections are about to expire: a national eviction moratorium and expanded unemployment insurance benefits.**

The national eviction moratorium ends today. Without an extension, millions of people could be out on the street. And extended unemployment coverage is set to end next week -- which would cut critical relief to tens of millions of Americans.

Elizabeth is fighting to extend and expand the national eviction moratorium, provide emergency rental assistance, and increase funding for families experiencing homelessness. And she's got a plan to make sure extended unemployment coverage is tied to how the economy is doing, rather than an arbitrary expiration date -- so it lasts throughout this crisis. But she can't get this done alone -- we need to fight by her side.

**[We can't let Republicans in Congress hold the eviction moratorium and extended unemployment coverage hostage. Families need relief. Add your name right now to demand action to protect people's lives and livelihoods during this crisis.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cf7/3768180179/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxOVBfU0dOX0tJQ19UXzIwMjAwNzI0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-covid-nyt?source=EMT19P_SGN_KIC_T_20200724_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

\- Warren Democrats

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Elizabeth Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Tue, July 21, 2020
Subject: Add your name if you agree: Congress must take these bold steps to address the pandemic and ensure relief for working people.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com |
---
**We wanted to make sure you saw Elizabeth's message in the New York Times about how our government needs to respond to the pandemic and economic crisis. Take a look below.**

**[And if you're ready to support Warren Democrats like Elizabeth who know that we need to meet this moment with bold reforms, add your name here.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cf7/3768180179/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxOVBfU0dOX0tJQ19UXzIwMjAwNzI0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-covid-nyt?source=EMT19P_SGN_KIC_T_20200724_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
---

Americans stayed at home and sacrificed for months to flatten the curve and prevent the spread of the coronavirus.

That gave us time to take the steps needed to address the pandemic -- but Donald Trump squandered it, refusing to issue national stay-at-home guidelines, failing to set up a national testing operation and fumbling production of personal protective equipment. Now, Congress must again act as this continues to spiral out of control.

Those who frame the debate as one of health versus economics are missing the point. It is not possible to fix the economy without first containing the virus.

**We need a bold, ambitious legislative response that does four things:**
1. Brings the virus under control
2. Gets our schools, child care centers, businesses, and state and local governments the resources they need
3. Addresses the burdens on communities of color
4. Supports struggling families who don't know when the next paycheck will come

**But Washington won't do anything unless a grassroots movement demands it.**

[Add your name if you agree: Congress must take these bold steps to address the pandemic and ensure relief for working people.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cf7/3768180179/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxOVBfU0dOX0tJQ19UXzIwMjAwNzI0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-covid-nyt?source=EMT19P_SGN_KIC_T_20200724_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Here's what the next federal response must include:

**Start with funding the robust public health measures we know will work to address this crisis:** ramped-up testing, a national contact-tracing program and supply-chain investments to resolve medical supply shortages. Without these measures, we will not be able to adequately reopen safely, more people will die and there will be no economic recovery.

Our schools face enormous challenges, like figuring out whether and how to safely reopen, how to help students who fell further behind because of distance learning -- disproportionately students of color. The next legislative package should include **at least $500 billion to stabilize state and local governments and at least $175 billion for our public schools to help them reopen safely, avoid teacher layoffs, and provide the mental health and other services our children require.**

No one can reopen schools by just snapping fingers. No matter what Betsy DeVos says.

Parents are drowning. Child care centers and schools are closed, yet essential workers are expected to still go to work each day, or night. Even parents who can work from home are expected to feed the baby and help their children learn while participating in Zoom calls. We cannot begin to have a recovery without affordable child care. The next relief package must include **$50 billion in emergency support to keep child care providers in business now and make long-term investments so more families can find affordable, high-quality and safe care in the future.**

Rather than bullying businesses into reopening, then shielding them from liability when people inevitably get sick and die, let's instead make sure they have the resources necessary to put the health and security of their workers first, and enforceable safety standards set by OSHA. **The Essential Workers Bill of Rights, which I proposed with Representative Ro Khanna, would include federal money for hazard pay, sick leave, family and medical leave, and enforceable health and safety protections for all essential workers.**

While the virus continues to rage, **extended unemployment coverage** is critical. Rather than set arbitrary expiration dates for unemployment insurance, let's tie those benefits to real-time economic data. Families would be better off and we'd be investing in a stronger economic recovery.

**The structural racism that has long existed in this country has caused the pandemic to hit Black and Latino neighborhoods and Indian Country especially hard.** The next relief package must include Senate Democrats' proposal for **at least $350 billion immediately invested in these communities.**

To avoid a tsunami that could put millions of people out on the street, Congress should **extend and expand the national eviction moratorium, provide emergency rental assistance, and increase funding for families experiencing homelessness.** We should **broadly cancel student loan debt** so families don't have a student debt bomb waiting for them on the other side of this pandemic -- a burden that again falls disproportionately on students of color.

Americans are generous, but if they're going to put up taxpayer money during this pandemic, we need **strong anti-corruption protections** like my CORE Act to make sure a bunch of Trump-connected businesses that can hire armies of lobbyists can't swoop up big chunks of relief funding.

Our constituents are counting on us to deliver the relief they desperately need. The House passed a relief bill over two months ago. Now the Senate must act to contain the virus and to provide the funding so that our economy, our schools and our families can begin to recover. This is about saving lives and livelihoods -- and we don't have time to waste.

[If you agree that our government must take bold action -- to contain the pandemic and rebuild our economy -- add your name here to demand it.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cf7/3768180179/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxOVBfU0dOX0tJQ19UXzIwMjAwNzI0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-covid-nyt?source=EMT19P_SGN_KIC_T_20200724_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cf7/3768180179/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxOVBfU0dOX0tJQ19UXzIwMjAwNzI0X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-covid-nyt?source=EMT19P_SGN_KIC_T_20200724_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cf6/3768180179/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cf9/3768180179/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cf8/3768180179/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cfb/3768180179/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cfa/3768180179/VEsHBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525007/45c30650/1cc2fe8e4/66e87cfd/3768180179/VEsHBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Team Shedd
subject: Tiffany Shedd’s birthday is around the corner, and so is a RED WAVE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, Tiffany Shedd’s birthday is just seven days away! All she wants for her 52nd birthday is the chance to fight in Congress **FOR** this great nation and **AGAINST** the radical socialist forces intent on its destruction. name: Hart HQ
subject: Rita wants to hear from you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/SPG7dPHOhavtBtl27CVNSeONY_WGEQFAb3S4tLWoECA=/B_3Q8vg0srYS8ZRXqmeP9bFwYJQ0Fn3dKZ-27KiMvyo=) People across our district deserve a representative who listens to what you have to say and will go to Congress to deliver those results. **That person is Rita Hart.** Health care is a personal issue. It affects all of us, and too many in our community struggle with rising costs of health care and life-saving prescription drugs. With all the gridlock in Washington, we know that Rita is exactly the person we need to go to work for our health care. **[Share your health care story and tell Rita why it's important to you that we fight Big Pharma and defend the protections for those with pre-existing conditions and families across IA-02.](https://act.myngp.com/el/SPG7dPHOhavtBtl27CVNSeONY_WGEQFAb3S4tLWoECA=/B_3Q8vg0srYS8ZRXqmeP9bFwYJQ0Fn3dKZ-27KiMvyo=)** | **[Share your health care story](https://act.myngp.com/el/SPG7dPHOhavtBtl27CVNSeONY_WGEQFAb3S4tLWoECA=/B_3Q8vg0srYS8ZRXqmeP9bFwYJQ0Fn3dKZ-27KiMvyo=)**
---

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Winning in Georgia depends on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Jon and I need you on this one.
| | |
---
Friend: Something incredible is happening here in Georgia.

In 2017, when Jon Ossoff (D) ran for Georgia's 6th Congressional District, flipping a Republican stronghold was almost out of the question. But today, everyone from CBS News to Stacey Abrams is calling Georgia the number one __ battleground - and Jon and I are on the verge of finally defeating our GOP incumbents and flipping our home state blue.

**News just broke that election experts at The Cook Political Report _upgraded_ Georgia to TOSS-UP status, meaning we've never been closer to winning. But it also means that Republicans will be pulling out all the stops to halt our momentum - and the _only_ way we'll have the resources to fight back is if people like you rush your immediate grassroots support.**
**[Friend: Can you give $5 or more now to help Jon and me reach our $20,000 rapid-response goal so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e26d/288179be/9e33d8a/348e7c37/369229224/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZ2FzZW5hdGViYXR0bGVncm91bmQiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azQ2NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gasenatebattleground?refcode=jtk464-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e26d/288179be/9e33d8a/348e7c37/369229224/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZ2FzZW5hdGViYXR0bGVncm91bmQiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azQ2NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gasenatebattleground?refcode=jtk464-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
We're fighting to unseat extremist Republicans who are taking our country in the wrong direction - and taking Georgians' votes for granted. And right now, they're spending millions of megadonor money to attack us, and they've got the backing of Mitch McConnell and the GOP establishment to help them win.
Georgians are ready for real change, and we CAN deliver it - but we can't do it alone. To restore moral leadership to Washington, expand affordable health care and build an economy that works for all - not just those at the top - we need all the support we can get from this grassroots team.
**Friend, hitting this rapid-response goal means pulling ahead in those neck-and-neck polls. It means Jon and I can fight back against more than $24 million worth of GOP-funded ads. And it means flipping this battleground state and taking back the Senate for Democrats:[So please, with so much on the line in this historic election year, can you donate $5 or more now - every dollar makes a difference - to help Jon and me keep up our momentum, win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e26d/288179be/9e33d8a/348e7c37/369229224/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZ2FzZW5hdGViYXR0bGVncm91bmQiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azQ2NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gasenatebattleground?refcode=jtk464-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for standing with us in this fight.

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e26d/288179be/9e33d8a/348e7c30/369229224/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

Voting can already be a difficult process in our country, and the COVID-19 pandemic has only made it more confusing. [Here's what you need to know about evolving vote-by-mail policies in each state](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=10a7fa2a7d&e=0aad15100c) \- don't forget to check your state's elections website for the most up-to-date info!

_7.20.20 | The Washington Post_ Mourning the loss of civil rights icon Rep. John Lewis.
[ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=1f25a82c0c&e=0aad15100c)

|

|

**What You Can Do: **

---
| | [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=13b3ae6fc3&e=0aad15100c)

Ranked choice voting is proven to increase voter turnout and make elections more efficient and representative. [Call your representative to endorse the Ranked Choice Voting Act](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=e19eb8a55c&e=0aad15100c), which would require ranked choice elections for the House and Senate.

******\- Rep. John Lewis**
March on Washington, 1963

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Prudent next step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Let’s continue to be able to go to work and shop. Let’s send our kids to school and live our lives. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/welcome-to-the-general-election-469570?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Prudent Next Step_** Let’s take a moment to remember our thoughts when we were all hunkered down. Many of us were willing to do anything to get our economy open again (me included). Well, there’s something easy we can all do that could help slow the spread of COVID-19: Wear A Mask.

Here are the facts today: For two straight days, Indiana has reported our largest single-day spikes in COVID-19 cases (954 yesterday and 1,011 today) since the pandemic began. We’re seeing the rate of positive cases increase (3.6% a month ago to 7% 7-day average today), and hospitalizations climb (about 600 a day at the end of June, about 800 a day now).

We all want to keep our loved ones safe, while also keeping our economy getting back on track. We don’t want to have to hunker down again, and we don’t want to go backwards.

Today, to keep our economy open, we must limit the spread of COVID-19. And to do that, we have a tool at our disposal – wearing a face mask. Other states (including many led, like Indiana, by conservative governors) have had to take steps backward in their reopening plans. **Governor Holcomb** doesn’t want that.

There are no easy decisions left now during this pandemic. Let’s continue to be able to go to work and shop. Let’s send our kids to school and live our lives.

If just a few months ago, you were calling to keep our economy open, please join me in wearing a mask. You don’t have to love it, but you can be part of the solution.

\- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_More Hoosier Jobs Are On The Way!_** One of **Governor Holcomb's** biggest priorities is bringing more great jobs and opportunities to all Hoosiers. This week, he was on hand to celebrate the expansion of Hoosier family-owned Palmer Trucks and the groundbreaking of a new Subaru production plant in Lafayette!

On Tuesday, **Governor Holcomb** joined executives from Palmer Trucks, a third generation, family-owned truck sales, parts and service provider, as the company announced plans to [expand its operations in Central Indiana](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ca895bcfe4&e=1acd9bb3d6)! This $17 million expansion will create up to 220 new jobs for Hoosiers. _**"With homegrown Hoosier companies like Palmer Trucks at the wheel, Indiana will continue to position our state for long-term economic stabilization and growth." - Gov. Holcomb**_ On Thursday, **Governor Holcomb** [joined executives from Subaru of Indiana Automotive](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f43d849881&e=1acd9bb3d6) to break ground on the company's $158 million Lafayette expansion. To support this growth, the company plans to create up to 350 new jobs for Hoosiers. Subaru is one of more than 300 Japanese businesses in Indiana that together employ more than 67,230 Hoosiers. _**“For nearly 35 years, Subaru of America has been an important partner in supporting Indiana's economy and creating great career opportunities in the community.” - Gov. Holcomb**_ To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9304c3b197&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7ebb551588&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=af2b2c9ca7&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bdf96854a6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Vice President Mike Pence Thanks Governor Holcomb**_ Earlier today, Vice President Mike Pence was in Indiana, and he had a message for Hoosiers:
**“Wearing a mask wherever state or local health officials indicate that it’s appropriate or when social distancing is not possible is how we keep Indiana opening up.”**
**“Governor, I want everyone in this state to know the President and I and our entire team fully support your leadership and the steps you’ve taken in Indiana to keep this state on the right track”**
[Click here to watch the video and hear what Vice President](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a0f692f2f2&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ Pence had to say!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7ee67cc9bc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Mask Up Hoosiers!_** **Governor Holcomb** announced that starting this Monday, Hoosiers will need to mask up in certain situations in order to combat the state's rise in COVID-19.

This includes while inside a business, a public building, or public space that is open to the public, while using public transit, or while you're not able to socially distance outside.

It doesn't include private offices/workspace, or in many situations where social distancing can be achieved. It also excludes Hoosiers with health conditions that would prevent wearing a mask, Hoosiers who are eating, and Hoosiers attending religious services. [Read the full executive order here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c0eda1b074&e=1acd9bb3d6) for full guidelines and exemptions.

Compliance will focus on continuing to remind Hoosiers about the importance of wearing face coverings.

[Read the full order here. ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=08f1060abb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Welcome Home, Vice President Pence!**_ It's always great to welcome home Indiana's own **Vice President Mike Pence**! As we continue to fight the COVID-19 pandemic, he was in Indiana today for a roundtable discussion with **Governor Holcomb** and education leaders at Marian University to discuss a safe reopening of schools.

Thank you, **Vice President Pence** , for your leadership during this challenging time!

|

| _**Last Saturday Was Super!**_ Thanks to every volunteer across Indiana who was out in the heat last weekend talking to Hoosiers as part of our Super Saturday! This is crucial work that will make a big difference for our entire Republican team – led by our statewide candidates **President Trump, Vice President Pence, Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch** , and attorney general nominee**Todd Rokita**!

Want to get involved to support our Republican team this November? [Sign up here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b6ce298f96&e=1acd9bb3d6), and a member of our team will be in touch!

clean_body: Let’s continue to be able to go to work and shop. Let’s send our kids to school and live our lives. | | | | | | | | Prudent Next Step Let’s take a moment to remember our thoughts when we were all hunkered down. Many of us were willing to do anything to get our economy open again (me included). Well, there’s something easy we can all do that could help slow the spread of COVID-19: Wear A Mask. Here are the facts today: For two straight days, Indiana has reported our largest single-day spikes in COVID-19 cases (954 yesterday and 1,011 today) since the pandemic began. We’re seeing the rate of positive cases increase (3.6% a month ago to 7% 7-day average today), and hospitalizations climb (about 600 a day at the end of June, about 800 a day now). We all want to keep our loved ones safe, while also keeping our economy getting back on track. We don’t want to have to hunker down again, and we don’t want to go backwards. Today, to keep our economy open, we must limit the spread of COVID-19. And to do that, we have a tool at our disposal – wearing a face mask. Other states (including many led, like Indiana, by conservative governors) have had to take steps backward in their reopening plans. Governor Holcomb doesn’t want that. There are no easy decisions left now during this pandemic. Let’s continue to be able to go to work and shop. Let’s send our kids to school and live our lives. If just a few months ago, you were calling to keep our economy open, please join me in wearing a mask. You don’t have to love it, but you can be part of the solution. \- Chairman Kyle Hupfer | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | More Hoosier Jobs Are On The Way! One of Governor Holcomb's biggest priorities is bringing more great jobs and opportunities to all Hoosiers. This week, he was on hand to celebrate the expansion of Hoosier family-owned Palmer Trucks and the groundbreaking of a new Subaru production plant in Lafayette! On Tuesday, Governor Holcomb joined executives from Palmer Trucks, a third generation, family-owned truck sales, parts and service provider, as the company announced plans to ! This $17 million expansion will create up to 220 new jobs for Hoosiers. "With homegrown Hoosier companies like Palmer Trucks at the wheel, Indiana will continue to position our state for long-term economic stabilization and growth." - Gov. Holcomb On Thursday, Governor Holcomb to break ground on the company's $158 million Lafayette expansion. To support this growth, the company plans to create up to 350 new jobs for Hoosiers. Subaru is one of more than 300 Japanese businesses in Indiana that together employ more than 67,230 Hoosiers. “For nearly 35 years, Subaru of America has been an important partner in supporting Indiana's economy and creating great career opportunities in the community.” - Gov. Holcomb To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , and ! | | | Vice President Mike Pence Thanks Governor Holcomb Earlier today, Vice President Mike Pence was in Indiana, and he had a message for Hoosiers: “Wearing a mask wherever state or local health officials indicate that it’s appropriate or when social distancing is not possible is how we keep Indiana opening up.” “Governor, I want everyone in this state to know the President and I and our entire team fully support your leadership and the steps you’ve taken in Indiana to keep this state on the right track” | | | Mask Up Hoosiers! Governor Holcomb announced that starting this Monday, Hoosiers will need to mask up in certain situations in order to combat the state's rise in COVID-19. If you don’t accept your offer NOW, you may never get another chance to join. I’ll be walking through the Hall of Fame later today and I’ll be looking for your name. Make sure I see it. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT in the NEXT HOUR to get your name in the Trump Donor Hall of Fame. Thank you, Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
“The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) late Thursday released new guidelines with a heavy focus on reopening schools in the fall.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d915ca70e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**CDC Releases Updated Guidelines in Favor of Reopening Schools**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47a29a8af3&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Hill_
“The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) late Thursday released new guidelines with a heavy focus on reopening schools in the fall,” J. Edward Moreno writes. “School closures have disrupted normal ways of life for children and parents, and they have had negative health consequences on our youth,” CDC Director Robert Redfield said.
---
|
---
| [**The Portland DHS Operation Is Legal and Proportionate**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7ad1f6f664&e=3ee4985eea)
_-National Review_
“The [federal law enforcement] deployment in Portland is plainly legal, justified, and proportionate,” Rich Lowry writes. “Now that Department of Homeland Security officials have explained the operation, there’s no excuse for the continued Nazi references—not that there ever really was.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Right to Shut Chinese Consulate in Houston — It Was a Massive Spying Operation**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8dd8820407&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“For the [Chinese Communist Party], the Houston consulate served as a base of operations to exploit commercial joint ventures for state purposes and to gain access to advanced technology, proprietary information, and intellectual property in order to advance Beijing’s efforts to undermine U.S. economic and national security,” Sen. Marco Rubio (R-FL) writes.
---
|
---
| [**Ivanka Trump Speaks at RMNP Discovery Center, Hikes Bear Lake**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a24864c8d7&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Estes Park Trail Gazette_
Ivanka Trump visited Rocky Mountain National Park in Colorado this week, where she joined Interior Secretary David Bernhardt to celebrate the Great American Outdoors Act passing through Congress. Ms. Trump called the bipartisan bill the “the farthest reaching conservation legislation since Theodore Roosevelt over 100 year ago.”
---
|
---
| [**In Coronavirus Economy, Trump Administration Pulling Out All Stops to Help Small Business**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54816bc489&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“The Paycheck Protection Program has helped save nearly 5 million small businesses and 51 million jobs,” U.S. Small Business Administrator Jovita Carranza writes. In addition, “at the direction of the president, federal agencies have already taken more than 700 deregulatory actions” to remove obstacles to job creation and growth, she says.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=20ed55f59c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ba6b32fd3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=65a9606510)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Joe Biden HQ
subject: Please let me explain why your donation tonight would make a huge impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
100 days is not a lot of time. |
---
Peter, can you believe we're almost 100 days away from Election Day? This Sunday will mark 100 days.

And here is something you may not have realized: That's less time than it's been since we all started social distancing and changing the way we live, the way we work, the way children learn, and so many more things.

**100 days is not a lot of time when you consider how this election impacts all of our futures. Which is why I come to you with an urgent ask.**

[**Can I count on you to chip in your first $5 for July toward our 100 days goal? Donating $5 to our campaign translates into winning in just over 100 days and here 's how:**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.24_B2_KatieP100days_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.24_B2_KatieP100days_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

As Joe Biden's Finance Director, it's my job to make sure we're bringing in enough donations to fuel our national operation to beat Donald Trump.

There's so much we need to do over the coming months to earn every vote and ensure that Joe Biden wins, and doing that important work is going to be expensive. So we're relying on support from you to fuel this fight over the next 102 days.

When you give today, you're taking a crucial step towards electing a President who will bring our country back together and lead us through the difficult challenges ahead. I'm hoping I can count on you to make today -- and these next 102 days -- count.

**If you are able to pitch in $5 or anything at all to fuel this movement and put us closer to our 100 days goal, Peter, I 'd be so grateful. I'm including your supporter history below and some buttons based on your record to make giving easier.** | **Biden for President**
**July Supporter Record** **Name:** Peter Willis
**Date of last contribution:** N/A
**Amount from you that would make the most impact today:** $5

We're in a battle for the soul of our nation, Peter, and it's one we can't wage without your support. We mean that sincerely.

Since the beginning, this campaign has been fueled by folks like you chipping in a couple of bucks at a time, and the next 102 days will be no different. We need everyone engaged in this fight to defeat Donald Trump.

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8f4/1cd0ac28/17323ac96/357dcd77/1840459142/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

clean_body: 100 days is not a lot of time. | Peter, can you believe we're almost 100 days away from Election Day? This Sunday will mark 100 days. And here is something you may not have realized: That's less time than it's been since we all started social distancing and changing the way we live, the way we work, the way children learn, and so many more things. 100 days is not a lot of time when you consider how this election impacts all of our futures. Which is why I come to you with an urgent ask. "" As Joe Biden's Finance Director, it's my job to make sure we're bringing in enough donations to fuel our national operation to beat Donald Trump. There's so much we need to do over the coming months to earn every vote and ensure that Joe Biden wins, and doing that important work is going to be expensive. So we're relying on support from you to fuel this fight over the next 102 days. When you give today, you're taking a crucial step towards electing a President who will bring our country back together and lead us through the difficult challenges ahead. I'm hoping I can count on you to make today -- and these next 102 days -- count. If you are able to pitch in $5 or anything at all to fuel this movement and put us closer to our 100 days goal, Peter, I 'd be so grateful. I'm including your supporter history below and some buttons based on your record to make giving easier. | Biden for President July Supporter Record Name: Peter Willis Date of last contribution: N/A Amount from you that would make the most impact today: $5 Next steps: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" We're in a battle for the soul of our nation, Peter, and it's one we can't wage without your support. We mean that sincerely. Since the beginning, this campaign has been fueled by folks like you chipping in a couple of bucks at a time, and the next 102 days will be no different. We need everyone engaged in this fight to defeat Donald Trump. So I 'm hoping I can count on you now. Please, if you're able, pitch in your first $5 for July today and let's win this thing: "" Thank you, Katie Petrelius Finance Director Biden for President | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

Did you see what happened in Chicago last night?

Mayor Lightfoot is quickly losing control of her city to gun violence, anti-police riots, and the politically correct left which will stop at nothing to tear down our nation’s history and statues.

**Instead of focusing on the REAL problems facing Chicago, she’s focused on appeasing the violent demonstrators who are attacking our police officers by ordering the city to tear down two statues honoring Christopher Columbus overnight.**
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=4597e9937e744541a9fcc1f07de61730&_e=2cNf07TLhPcxEwp6fa0M_vN538gzeVU3mlbNqQaf04W0oO30QAO0ENI_GRtEvUe_B1Hy01Rl0Pma7eAYS_TvngLkZQKL0-KC5FfN8rV3F1YOsHI5YRry7U74w4M7cot_F9ZyZGZNOlvl9Go5_qVTAvesSUZa5KSSlpEh53lXs9wS2ywXkf70PXqMrSRCoHNF2G3LO1RdEXVsn9nQTYz9L6fgPVNyGo5nEYhWajOoT2aCF7ZnKK4OuirazthnzqmCJBMXW1YRqomJtId4pCUXXuDxNqr4ldwuSDdIVBrqvvAthO0x1BsSBWEPRdxBj35_l-9Eb56gJBryP3kEQ7P5vnaMUy2pWftJcrviXC93wLa4XZkXKeB2wPl6QfkKVnCaEzVN-u_PT2egKM0cipIftvLGvTfvE4QSwJS-97v55xUaVMaDMXC32-Qn_02O43p_2ahqsCVukBKMvOhsEOhUji35myZ9q3upkGR-uSg9RY4%3D)

This is just another example of the Left’s crusade of political correctness, cancel culture, and the policing of free speech and free expression in America – and it threatens the very values that our nation was founded on.

That's why the very next day, the nonpartisan analysts at Cook officially upgraded this race to a "TOSS-UP." They say Georgia is giving Republicans "HEARTBURN," and they see Georgia as a TIPPING POINT STATE to decide control of the U.S. Senate. Republicans are now spending more money to defend this seat than every other race but one. The momentum is all on our side. Together, we're going to turn Georgia blue this November and take control of the U.S. Senate. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Onward, Team Ossoff \-------- Begin Forwarded Message --------- From: POLL ALERT - via Team Ossoff To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Date: Thursday, July 23 Subject: 🚨NEW POLL in Georgia Senate race🚨 BREAKING: Jon Ossoff WINNING in Georgia! "" Friend -- Our people-powered movement is beating corrupt Washington insider David Perdue. Our internal polling found Jon Ossoff ahead, 45% to 44%! The poll also finds that Jon's support grows as more Georgia voters get to know him and hear about his track record fighting corruption. Jon has a 16-point lead among voters who know both candidates. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Jon is in an excellent position heading into November. Despite Jon being the challenger in the race, the poll shows his voters are more committed than his incumbent opponent's. And Jon has room to grow his lead as he increases his name recognition. Plus, in another sign of sinking Republican fortunes in Georgia, our polling has Vice President Joe Biden leading President Trump by four points in the state. Friend, we are going to turn Georgia blue this November! But we need the resources to spread Jon's positive message to 100% of Georgia voters -- and to fend off the more than $25 MILLION the GOP has already committed to protect Trump's favorite Senator here in Georgia. "" | "" Let's win this thing, Team Ossoff | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

body:
Voting by mail is a safe, effective way to make sure all voices are heard. But Arizonans already know that -- we’ve been voting by mail for years! Th | | | [](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=7ce095d094944f3a9abfbe048ee08669&_e=wdCK7dkBD2jp2-wNEdYiqwH_EmXHuuAfWzS_ooLYeRjvXQwUfv4zhTxqnwfpLbK1YFhxAxc7ORqs5d2k6-IzEXFUiI3uMYOC6CQ-xQt4U83hlTU6s7lhzk2dlYGvWdYLjZc2OpYT2aH16FpzfVE2edmjduPA3EPCC-7Knbg8-_yZokXLO_3m9Cx0H2g76ZmN_JKEyrab_VwFg5EBMwGLTbiVa9yiIRSLiro_L7fsQ8Yg31pb8fYlHVRYcMgC2gDIwg1ZbUx7L00ESe4FXnXoTnKy6k7IKXJ1qKGaoh4eRqc%3D) Folks, Today is the last day for Arizonans to request an absentee ballot to vote in the primary elections. [**If you still need to request your ballot to vote-by-mail, make sure to do it today!**](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=7ce095d094944f3a9abfbe048ee08669&_e=wdCK7dkBD2jp2-wNEdYiqwH_EmXHuuAfWzS_ooLYeRjvXQwUfv4zhTxqnwfpLbK1YFhxAxc7ORqs5d2k6-IzEYlazUp36WG36uKb8Y_1xFMD32uwsizqlgI2aFToXbDAdR02KQDrJk-nwrb2RxNni9laMuqKGcV31GBTEEuHxAnkFsfdInCf1jpUP4A2Qsli1L92t8iQep7FwYyYkQs_MpuqyzoCLqGbYEhZ2gxw8SVj6WwUICKlTnaoj-SOBYALB3IYMwenFirDN2gWQ-81OISxeNxushBYmFag4Ww-Rms%3D) [SIGN UP](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=7ce095d094944f3a9abfbe048ee08669&_e=wdCK7dkBD2jp2-wNEdYiqwH_EmXHuuAfWzS_ooLYeRjvXQwUfv4zhTxqnwfpLbK1YFhxAxc7ORqs5d2k6-IzEQNScy8-t7n73nICRkKjZvKimilaq11vFOOPxr6weDnLgSC_0mVVBDF_n5rcd5Oq4182sjsT3BkD0TrFhFsBmEzl5cwEDWHrl1kw7gGtsRsgDMVXQX3JZ5xFx_ID7IpWhE9UM6MUNDyGVpwE52Us3sDWC3XNmi6vUiDvaA3Kj9hpCgaUukPxMMwo5bQvyZaE9ZHYiKD_r2Pg4k4Npy89_70%3D) Voting by mail is a safe, effective way to make sure all voices are heard. But Arizonans already know that -- we’ve been voting by mail for years! This election will be one of the most consequential in our lifetimes. We need to win, and I’m excited to continue blazing that trail with you towards November. [**Make sure you request your absentee ballot if you haven’t already, and return them before Election Day on August 4th.**](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=7ce095d094944f3a9abfbe048ee08669&_e=wdCK7dkBD2jp2-wNEdYiqwH_EmXHuuAfWzS_ooLYeRjvXQwUfv4zhTxqnwfpLbK1YFhxAxc7ORqs5d2k6-IzEcagNQ5CZI62JbK84tipT8YIQnYDC2KxMjKzozP3p0ywnVQau8bCPGNFYBxIvaK5nf8TDj4cRNhE-Hwwd9FonYGcBF4dVehV40ULl-m0fT5GuE3A1OT5Lp5X6KLmpNwEJ2Fx0YWwbX2vjml2BD8lh3TuTVVKodcobfQ1FieZi-_LIBq_Kc8b7sKvcYQy615losPd9Nf2hunnrGlfDynoMCs%3D) Thank you,
Tom O’Halleran

Tom O'Halleran is a former police officer, business owner and a family man who serves in Congress to bring people together to solve the challenges our communities face every day. Now he's running for re-election to keep Arizona's first district blue in 2020. body:
Our Washington slate is on fire! Strong women ready to lead in the State House to U.S. Congress! This is how we reclaim our 1,000 seats nationwide! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=69ec7777e9&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
# **SUPER WOMEN OF WASHINGTON**
---
|
### **Beth Doglio, Sharlett Mena, Tarra Simmons, Glenda Breiler: reclaiming seats in Washington & DC**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=cd95670737&e=66979298f9)
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=88f54b64a1&e=66979298f9)
---

---
|
---
| [Give $4 for Washington!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=2053bb8e67&e=66979298f9 "Give $4 for Washington!")
---
|
---
|
# OUR WASHINGTON SLATE
---
| _Nationwide we are focused on building our bench from State House seats to U.S. Congress - and we have the winning team!_
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=a386b77fa5&e=66979298f9)
---
#### **Beth Doglio **is running for U.S. Congress in Washington's 10th District
We have big plans in the 10th CD with our new established Future Generations Victory Fund. We would be honored to have your support in ensuring Beth's chances at crossing the finish line this August 4th Primary. Join us tonight at 4pm PST to phone bank for Beth!
| [Join Zoom Party for Beth!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=134286c6e7&e=66979298f9 "Join Zoom Party for Beth!")
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c2d97450f9&e=66979298f9)
---
#### **Sharlett Mena **is running for Washington State House District 29.
Help Future Generations text voters for Sharlett Mena's historic campaign for State House. We have just two weeks left to make sure that voters know that Sharlett is the candidate to support in the 29th LD. We are prepared to send thousands of text messages to ensure that just like Jasmine and Lorenzo, Sharlett crushes her primary.
| [Volunteer for Sharlett!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b2da0d8659&e=66979298f9 "Volunteer for Sharlett!")
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=35eeda0a0d&e=66979298f9)
---
#### **Tarra Simmons **is running for Washington State House District 23.
Tarra is a fighter and has made history as someone who was formerly incarcerated, turned lawyer. In her community she has led as a civil rights activist and an advocate for criminal justice reform. Tarra was appointed by Governor Jay Inslee and elected by her peers to co-chair the Washington State Reentry Council. Tarra was also appointed to the Public Defense Advisory Board and serves as an advisory board member to the Washington Supreme Court Gender and Justice Commission. Through her struggles Tarra has always looked forward and for ways to give a voice to our most vulnerable communities. Will you join Tarra in fighting for future generations?
| [Volunteer for Tarra!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1b899cfaab&e=66979298f9 "Volunteer for Tarra!")
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=d0a50c33fe&e=66979298f9)
---
#### **Glenda Breiler **is running for Washington State House District 22.
Glenda is an incredible candidate that needs your support in order to pull through her primary. Every text and call that voters makes helps Glenda get one step closer to reaching her goals!
| [Volunteer for Glenda!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1152295c7e&e=66979298f9 "Volunteer for Glenda!")
---
|
---
| | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, campaigns are focusing on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents.** **
---
| [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=ea074dd643&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
|
### A NOTE FROM CHIARA D'ANGELO
---
| |
---
Each of these candidates stood out. Each of these candidates align with our values and are going to make a huge impact when elected. To ensure that we can get this candidates across the finish line we need a grassroots army of volunteers. Every volunteer hour counts. We have a once in a lifetime opportunity to elect these super women. We welcome your support.

Chiara D'Angelo
National Campaigns Director
[Chiara](mailto:Chiara@futuregenerations.earth)[@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)
