We are prepared to send thousands of text messages to ensure that just like Jasmine and Lorenzo, Sharlett crushes her primary. | "Volunteer for Sharlett!" | Tarra Simmons is running for Washington State House District 23. Tarra is a fighter and has made history as someone who was formerly incarcerated, turned lawyer. In her community she has led as a civil rights activist and an advocate for criminal justice reform. Tarra was appointed by Governor Jay Inslee and elected by her peers to co-chair the Washington State Reentry Council. Tarra was also appointed to the Public Defense Advisory Board and serves as an advisory board member to the Washington Supreme Court Gender and Justice Commission. Through her struggles Tarra has always looked forward and for ways to give a voice to our most vulnerable communities. Will you join Tarra in fighting for future generations? | "Volunteer for Tarra!" | Glenda Breiler is running for Washington State House District 22. Glenda is an incredible candidate that needs your support in order to pull through her primary. Every text and call that voters makes helps Glenda get one step closer to reaching her goals! | "Volunteer for Glenda!" | | | Due to COVID-19 health and safety restrictions, campaigns are focusing on phone and text banking to get our candidates message to their constituents. | | | A NOTE FROM CHIARA D'ANGELO | | Each of these candidates stood out. Each of these candidates align with our values and are going to make a huge impact when elected. To ensure that we can get this candidates across the finish line we need a grassroots army of volunteers. Every volunteer hour counts. We have a once in a lifetime opportunity to elect these super women. We welcome your support. Chiara D'Angelo National Campaigns Director mailto:Chiara@futuregenerations.earthmailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Future Generations PAC, All rights reserved.

name: Team Joe
subject: [You're Invited] #100DaysToBlue Virtual Pep Rally!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Join us! |
---
Peter -- As of July 26, we only have 100 days to mobilize, organize, and fight for Democrats in Pennsylvania. Join the Back To Blue campaign, Joe Biden, and Democrats across the commonwealth to celebrate #100DaysToBlue and share your story! In order to get out the vote this November, we're going to need all hands on deck. Join us on social media this Saturday to participate in a #100DaysToBlue digital pep rally celebrating 100 days to November 3 and sharing why it's more important than ever that people join our team! When you sign up, you will receive a resource guide for this virtual event. On Saturday, be sure to post on your social channels using the hashtag #100DaysToBlue, share what a Democratic blue Pennsylvania would mean to you, and urge your networks to join our team! For Democrats to win in 2020, we must energize supporters in every corner of the Commonwealth to talk to their neighbors, to show up for Democratic candidates, and to fight for keystone issues like access to healthcare, better jobs, and protecting our environment. **[Please click below to register, and to watch their discussion.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd403/1897723428/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/backtobluepa/event/291773/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.23_B8_100-Pep_X__F1_S1_C1_PA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.23_B8_100-Pep_X__F1_S1_C1_PA")** | | **#100DaysToBlue Virtual Pep Rally!** Saturday, July 25, 2020
Before 8:00 PM EDT RSVP below for a link to the virtual event!
---
| [**RSVP now >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd403/1897723428/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/backtobluepa/event/291773/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.23_B8_100-Pep_X__F1_S1_C1_PA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.07.23_B8_100-Pep_X__F1_S1_C1_PA")
---
Once you've RSVP'd, forward this to 3 friends to ensure they get involved too!
See you online!

Team Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd402/1897723428/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd401/1897723428/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd400/1897723428/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4ff/1897723428/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4fe/1897723428/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4fd/1897723428/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4fc/1897723428/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4fb/1897723428/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4fa/1897723428/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4f9/1897723428/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4fc/1897723428/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4f8/1897723428/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4fb/1897723428/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b90f/1cd0ac28/1735b3e18/357dd4f7/1897723428/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: 2020 Senate Alert
subject: BREAKING via Cook Political Report:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
This is the news we've been waiting for, friend.
| | |
---
**INCREDIBLE news for Democrats, friend:**
